authors_text: Mohamed Alshemi,Sherif Saif,Mohamed Taher
title: Hardware Acceleration of Lane Detection Algorithm: A GPU Versus FPGA Comparison
title_zh: 车道检测算法的硬件加速：GPU 与 FPGA 比较
abstract: A Complete Computer vision system can be divided into two main categories: detection and classification. The Lane detection algorithm is a part of the computer vision detection category and has been applied in autonomous driving and smart vehicle systems. The lane detection system is responsible for lane marking in a complex road environment. At the same time, lane detection plays a crucial role in the warning system for a car when departs the lane. The implemented lane detection algorithm is mainly divided into two steps: edge detection and line detection. In this paper, we will compare the state-of-the-art implementation performance obtained with both FPGA and GPU to evaluate the trade-off for latency, power consumption, and utilization. Our comparison emphasises the advantages and disadvantages of the two systems.
summary: A Complete Computer vision system can be divided into two main categories: detection and classification. The Lane detection algorithm is a part of the computer vision detection category and has been applied in autonomous driving and smart vehicle systems. The lane detection system is responsible for lane marking in a complex road environment. At the same time, lane detection plays a crucial role in the warning system for a car when departs the lane. The implemented lane detection algorithm is mainly divided into two steps: edge detection and line detection. In this paper, we will compare the state-of-the-art implementation performance obtained with both FPGA and GPU to evaluate the trade-off for latency, power consumption, and utilization. Our comparison emphasises the advantages and disadvantages of the two systems.
abstract_zh: 一个完整的计算机视觉系统可以分为两大类：检测和分类。车道检测算法属于计算机视觉检测范畴，已应用于自动驾驶和智能车辆系统中。车道检测系统负责复杂道路环境下的车道标线。同时，车道检测对于车辆偏离车道的预警系统也起着至关重要的作用。实现的车道检测算法主要分为两个步骤：边缘检测和直线检测。在本文中，我们将比较 FPGA 和 GPU 获得的最先进的实现性能，以评估延迟、功耗和利用率之间的权衡。我们的比较强调了两个系统的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了GPU与FPGA在车道检测算法硬件加速中的性能差异，重点分析延迟、功耗和资源利用率的权衡。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶和智能车辆系统需要高效且低功耗的车道检测方案，而GPU与FPGA在计算效率和能耗方面各有优势，需通过对比明确适用场景。
AI.method: 实现车道检测算法的两个核心步骤（边缘检测与线检测），分别在GPU和FPGA硬件平台上部署，通过实验测量并对比两者的性能指标。
AI.result: FPGA在功耗和资源利用率上表现更优，而GPU在计算吞吐量和开发灵活性方面更具优势，但具体性能需根据实际应用场景权衡。
AI.conclusion: 硬件选择应结合具体需求：对能效比要求高的场景优先FPGA，需快速开发或高并行计算的场景则适合GPU。

authors_text: Yingchun Wang,Jingcai Guo,Song Guo,Weizhan Zhang,Jie Zhang
title: Exploring Optimal Substructure for Out-of-distribution Generalization via Feature-targeted Model Pruning
title_zh: 通过针对特征的模型剪枝探索分布外泛化的最佳子结构
abstract: Recent studies show that even highly biased dense networks contain an unbiased substructure that can achieve better out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization than the original model. Existing works usually search the invariant subnetwork using modular risk minimization (MRM) with out-domain data. Such a paradigm may bring about two potential weaknesses: 1) Unfairness, due to the insufficient observation of out-domain data during training; and 2) Sub-optimal OOD generalization, due to the feature-untargeted model pruning on the whole data distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel Spurious Feature-targeted model Pruning framework, dubbed SFP, to automatically explore invariant substructures without referring to the above weaknesses. Specifically, SFP identifies in-distribution (ID) features during training using our theoretically verified task loss, upon which, SFP can perform ID targeted-model pruning that removes branches with strong dependencies on ID features. Notably, by attenuating the projections of spurious features into model space, SFP can push the model learning toward invariant features and pull that out of environmental features, devising optimal OOD generalization. Moreover, we also conduct detailed theoretical analysis to provide the rationality guarantee and a proof framework for OOD structures via model sparsity, and for the first time, reveal how a highly biased data distribution affects the model's OOD generalization. Extensive experiments on various OOD datasets show that SFP can significantly outperform both structure-based and non-structure OOD generalization SOTAs, with accuracy improvement up to 4.72% and 23.35%, respectively.
summary: Recent studies show that even highly biased dense networks contain an unbiased substructure that can achieve better out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization than the original model. Existing works usually search the invariant subnetwork using modular risk minimization (MRM) with out-domain data. Such a paradigm may bring about two potential weaknesses: 1) Unfairness, due to the insufficient observation of out-domain data during training; and 2) Sub-optimal OOD generalization, due to the feature-untargeted model pruning on the whole data distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel Spurious Feature-targeted model Pruning framework, dubbed SFP, to automatically explore invariant substructures without referring to the above weaknesses. Specifically, SFP identifies in-distribution (ID) features during training using our theoretically verified task loss, upon which, SFP can perform ID targeted-model pruning that removes branches with strong dependencies on ID features. Notably, by attenuating the projections of spurious features into model space, SFP can push the model learning toward invariant features and pull that out of environmental features, devising optimal OOD generalization. Moreover, we also conduct detailed theoretical analysis to provide the rationality guarantee and a proof framework for OOD structures via model sparsity, and for the first time, reveal how a highly biased data distribution affects the model's OOD generalization. Extensive experiments on various OOD datasets show that SFP can significantly outperform both structure-based and non-structure OOD generalization SOTAs, with accuracy improvement up to 4.72% and 23.35%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，即使是高度偏差的密集网络也包含无偏差的子结构，可以比原始模型实现更好的分布外（OOD）泛化。现有的工作通常使用域外数据的模块化风险最小化（MRM）来搜索不变子网。这样的范式可能会带来两个潜在的弱点：1）不公平，由于训练过程中对域外数据的观察不足； 2）由于对整个数据分布进行无目标特征的模型剪枝，导致 OOD 泛化次优。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以虚假特征为目标的模型修剪框架，称为SFP，可以自动探索不变的子结构，而无需参考上述弱点。具体来说，SFP 在训练过程中使用我们理论上验证的任务损失来识别分布内 (ID) 特征，在此基础上，SFP 可以执行 ID 目标模型剪枝，删除对 ID 特征有强烈依赖性的分支。值得注意的是，通过减弱虚假特征到模型空间的投影，SFP 可以将模型学习推向不变特征，并将其从环境特征中提取出来，从而设计出最佳的 OOD 泛化。此外，我们还进行了详细的理论分析，通过模型稀疏性为OOD结构提供了合理性保证和证明框架，并首次揭示了高度偏差的数据分布如何影响模型的OOD泛化能力。对各种 OOD 数据集的大量实验表明，SFP 可以显着优于基于结构和非结构的 OOD 泛化 SOTA，准确率分别提高高达 4.72% 和 23.35%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SFP的特征针对性模型剪枝框架，旨在通过识别并去除对训练数据分布过度依赖的分支，提升模型的分布外（OOD）泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在寻找不变子网络时存在两个问题：1）依赖外部数据导致训练不公平；2）全局剪枝无法针对性消除对训练特征的依赖，导致OOD泛化效果次优。
AI.method: SFP通过理论验证的任务损失识别训练数据分布特征（ID特征），针对性剪枝去除与ID特征强关联的网络分支，从而推动模型学习到更鲁棒的不变特征。
AI.result: 在多个OOD数据集上，SFP分别比结构化和非结构化OOD方法提升准确率4.72%和23.35%，并首次揭示了高度偏倚数据分布对OOD泛化的影响机制。
AI.conclusion: SFP通过特征针对性剪枝有效提升了OOD泛化能力，结合理论分析证明了模型稀疏性对OOD结构的合理性保障，为分布外学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Senem Tanberk,Mustafa Can
title: Smart Journey in Istanbul: A Mobile Application in Smart Cities for Traffic Estimation by Harnessing Time Series
title_zh: 伊斯坦布尔的智能之旅：智能城市中利用时间序列进行交通估算的移动应用程序
abstract: In recent decades, mobile applications (apps) have gained enormous popularity. Smart services for smart cities increasingly gain attention. The main goal of the proposed research is to present a new AI-powered mobile application on Istanbul's traffic congestion forecast by using traffic density data. It addresses the research question by using time series approaches (LSTM, Transformer, and XGBoost) based on past data over the traffic load dataset combined with meteorological conditions. Analysis of simulation results on predicted models will be discussed according to performance indicators such as MAPE, MAE, and RMSE. And then, it was observed that the Transformer model made the most accurate traffic prediction. The developed traffic forecasting prototype is expected to be a starting point on future products for a mobile application suitable for citizens' daily use.
summary: In recent decades, mobile applications (apps) have gained enormous popularity. Smart services for smart cities increasingly gain attention. The main goal of the proposed research is to present a new AI-powered mobile application on Istanbul's traffic congestion forecast by using traffic density data. It addresses the research question by using time series approaches (LSTM, Transformer, and XGBoost) based on past data over the traffic load dataset combined with meteorological conditions. Analysis of simulation results on predicted models will be discussed according to performance indicators such as MAPE, MAE, and RMSE. And then, it was observed that the Transformer model made the most accurate traffic prediction. The developed traffic forecasting prototype is expected to be a starting point on future products for a mobile application suitable for citizens' daily use.
abstract_zh: 近几十年来，移动应用程序 (app) 获得了极大的普及。智慧城市的智慧服务日益受到关注。拟议研究的主要目标是通过使用交通密度数据，提出一种新的人工智能驱动的移动应用程序，用于预测伊斯坦布尔的交通拥堵。它通过使用基于交通负载数据集过去数据并结合气象条件的时间序列方法（LSTM、Transformer 和 XGBoost）来解决研究问题。将根据MAPE、MAE和RMSE等性能指标讨论预测模型的仿真结果分析。然后，据观察，Transformer 模型做出了最准确的流量预测。开发的交通预测原型预计将成为适合公民日常使用的移动应用程序未来产品的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一款基于时间序列分析的移动应用，用于预测伊斯坦布尔交通拥堵情况，提升智能城市交通管理效率。
AI.motivation: 城市交通拥堵严重影响市民出行效率，传统预测方法存在精度不足问题，需结合多维度数据提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 采用LSTM、Transformer和XGBoost三种时间序列模型，融合历史交通流量数据与气象条件进行交通预测建模。
AI.result: 实验表明Transformer模型在MAPE、MAE、RMSE等指标上表现最优，预测准确率显著高于其他两种模型。
AI.conclusion: 该交通预测原型验证了多模态数据融合的有效性，为开发面向市民的智能出行移动应用提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Smart Journey in Istanbul: A Mobile Application in Smart Cities for Traffic Estimation by Harnessing Time Series 伊斯坦布尔的智能之旅：智能城市中利用时间序列进行交通估算的移动应用程序 In recent decades, mobile applications (apps) have gained enormous popularity. Smart services for smart cities increasingly gain attention. The main goal of the proposed research is to present a new AI-powered mobile application on Istanbul's traffic congestion forecast by using traffic density data. It addresses the research question by using time series approaches (LSTM, Transformer, and XGBoost) based on past data over the traffic load dataset combined with meteorological conditions. Analysis of simulation results on predicted models will be discussed according to performance indicators such as MAPE, MAE, and RMSE. And then, it was observed that the Transformer model made the most accurate traffic prediction. The developed traffic forecasting prototype is expected to be a starting point on future products for a mobile application suitable for citizens' daily use. 近几十年来，移动应用程序 (app) 获得了极大的普及。智慧城市的智慧服务日益受到关注。拟议研究的主要目标是通过使用交通密度数据，提出一种新的人工智能驱动的移动应用程序，用于预测伊斯坦布尔的交通拥堵。它通过使用基于交通负载数据集过去数据并结合气象条件的时间序列方法（LSTM、Transformer 和 XGBoost）来解决研究问题。将根据MAPE、MAE和RMSE等性能指标讨论预测模型的仿真结果分析。然后，据观察，Transformer 模型做出了最准确的流量预测。开发的交通预测原型预计将成为适合公民日常使用的移动应用程序未来产品的起点。 本文提出一款基于时间序列分析的移动应用，用于预测伊斯坦布尔交通拥堵情况，提升智能城市交通管理效率。 Senem Tanberk,Mustafa Can cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Gustavo H. de Rosa,Mateus Roder,João Paulo Papa,Claudio F. G. dos Santos
title: Improving Pre-Trained Weights Through Meta-Heuristics Fine-Tuning
title_zh: 通过元启发式微调改进预训练权重
abstract: Machine Learning algorithms have been extensively researched throughout the last decade, leading to unprecedented advances in a broad range of applications, such as image classification and reconstruction, object recognition, and text categorization. Nonetheless, most Machine Learning algorithms are trained via derivative-based optimizers, such as the Stochastic Gradient Descent, leading to possible local optimum entrapments and inhibiting them from achieving proper performances. A bio-inspired alternative to traditional optimization techniques, denoted as meta-heuristic, has received significant attention due to its simplicity and ability to avoid local optimums imprisonment. In this work, we propose to use meta-heuristic techniques to fine-tune pre-trained weights, exploring additional regions of the search space, and improving their effectiveness. The experimental evaluation comprises two classification tasks (image and text) and is assessed under four literature datasets. Experimental results show nature-inspired algorithms' capacity in exploring the neighborhood of pre-trained weights, achieving superior results than their counterpart pre-trained architectures. Additionally, a thorough analysis of distinct architectures, such as Multi-Layer Perceptron and Recurrent Neural Networks, attempts to visualize and provide more precise insights into the most critical weights to be fine-tuned in the learning process.
summary: Machine Learning algorithms have been extensively researched throughout the last decade, leading to unprecedented advances in a broad range of applications, such as image classification and reconstruction, object recognition, and text categorization. Nonetheless, most Machine Learning algorithms are trained via derivative-based optimizers, such as the Stochastic Gradient Descent, leading to possible local optimum entrapments and inhibiting them from achieving proper performances. A bio-inspired alternative to traditional optimization techniques, denoted as meta-heuristic, has received significant attention due to its simplicity and ability to avoid local optimums imprisonment. In this work, we propose to use meta-heuristic techniques to fine-tune pre-trained weights, exploring additional regions of the search space, and improving their effectiveness. The experimental evaluation comprises two classification tasks (image and text) and is assessed under four literature datasets. Experimental results show nature-inspired algorithms' capacity in exploring the neighborhood of pre-trained weights, achieving superior results than their counterpart pre-trained architectures. Additionally, a thorough analysis of distinct architectures, such as Multi-Layer Perceptron and Recurrent Neural Networks, attempts to visualize and provide more precise insights into the most critical weights to be fine-tuned in the learning process.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法在过去十年中得到了广泛的研究，在图像分类和重建、对象识别和文本分类等广泛的应用领域取得了前所未有的进步。尽管如此，大多数机器学习算法都是通过基于导数的优化器（例如随机梯度下降）进行训练，导致可能的局部最优陷阱并抑制它们实现适当的性能。传统优化技术的生物启发替代方案（称为元启发式）由于其简单性和避免局部最优限制的能力而受到了广泛关注。在这项工作中，我们建议使用元启发式技术来微调预训练的权重，探索搜索空间的其他区域，并提高其有效性。实验评估包括两个分类任务（图像和文本），并在四个文献数据集下进行评估。实验结果表明，受自然启发的算法具有探索预训练权重邻域的能力，比相应的预训练架构取得了更好的结果。此外，对不同架构（例如多层感知器和循环神经网络）的彻底分析，试图可视化并提供对学习过程中需要微调的最关键权重的更精确的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过元启发式算法微调预训练模型权重，以提升模型在图像和文本分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于梯度的优化器易陷入局部最优，而元启发式方法能更有效地探索权重空间，避免此问题。
AI.method: 采用自然启发式元优化算法对预训练权重进行微调，结合MLP和RNN等架构分析关键权重调整策略。
AI.result: 在四个数据集的实验中，元启发式微调方法在图像和文本分类任务中均优于传统预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 元启发式微调能有效提升预训练模型性能，未来可探索更复杂的优化策略与模型结构组合。

authors_text: Aijaz H Lone,Hanrui Li,Nazek El-Atab,Xiaohang Li,Hossein Fariborzi
title: Voltage Gated Domain Wall Magnetic Tunnel Junction-based Spiking Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 基于电压门控畴壁磁隧道结的尖峰卷积神经网络
abstract: We propose a novel spin-orbit torque (SOT) driven and voltage-gated domain wall motion (DWM)-based MTJ device and its application in neuromorphic computing. We show that by utilizing the voltage-controlled gating effect on the DWM, the access transistor can be eliminated. The device provides more control over individual synapse writing and shows highly linear synaptic behavior. The linearity dependence on material parameters such as DMI and temperature is evaluated for real-environment performance analysis. Furthermore, using skyrmion-based leaky integrate and fire neuron model, we implement the spiking convolutional neural network for pattern recognition applications on the CIFAR-10 data set. The accuracy of the device is above 85%, proving its applicability in SNN.
summary: We propose a novel spin-orbit torque (SOT) driven and voltage-gated domain wall motion (DWM)-based MTJ device and its application in neuromorphic computing. We show that by utilizing the voltage-controlled gating effect on the DWM, the access transistor can be eliminated. The device provides more control over individual synapse writing and shows highly linear synaptic behavior. The linearity dependence on material parameters such as DMI and temperature is evaluated for real-environment performance analysis. Furthermore, using skyrmion-based leaky integrate and fire neuron model, we implement the spiking convolutional neural network for pattern recognition applications on the CIFAR-10 data set. The accuracy of the device is above 85%, proving its applicability in SNN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新型自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）驱动和电压门控畴壁运动（DWM）的 MTJ 器件及其在神经形态计算中的应用。我们证明，通过利用 DWM 上的压控选通效应，可以消除存取晶体管。该设备提供了对单个突触写入的更多控制，并显示出高度线性的突触行为。评估 DMI 和温度等材料参数的线性依赖性，以进行真实环境性能分析。此外，使用基于斯格明子的漏积分和火神经元模型，我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上实现了用于模式识别应用的尖峰卷积神经网络。该装置的准确率达到85%以上，证明了其在SNN中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于电压门控域壁磁隧道结（MTJ）的脉冲卷积神经网络，用于神经形态计算。
AI.motivation: 传统突触器件存在能效低、控制精度不足等问题，需通过电压调控域壁运动实现更高效的神经形态计算。
AI.method: 提出自旋轨道扭矩驱动的电压门控域壁运动MTJ器件，结合天体物理神经元模型构建脉冲卷积神经网络，并在CIFAR-10数据集上验证性能。
AI.result: 器件在CIFAR-10数据集上实现85%以上的分类准确率，验证了其在脉冲神经网络中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该器件通过电压调控实现高线性度突触行为，为高效能神经形态计算提供了新方案。

The linearity dependence on material parameters such as DMI and temperature is evaluated for real-environment performance analysis. Furthermore, using skyrmion-based leaky integrate and fire neuron model, we implement the spiking convolutional neural network for pattern recognition applications on the CIFAR-10 data set. The accuracy of the device is above 85%, proving its applicability in SNN. 我们提出了一种新型自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）驱动和电压门控畴壁运动（DWM）的 MTJ 器件及其在神经形态计算中的应用。我们证明，通过利用 DWM 上的压控选通效应，可以消除存取晶体管。该设备提供了对单个突触写入的更多控制，并显示出高度线性的突触行为。评估 DMI 和温度等材料参数的线性依赖性，以进行真实环境性能分析。此外，使用基于斯格明子的漏积分和火神经元模型，我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上实现了用于模式识别应用的尖峰卷积神经网络。该装置的准确率达到85%以上，证明了其在SNN中的适用性。 设计一种基于电压门控域壁磁隧道结（MTJ）的脉冲卷积神经网络，用于神经形态计算。 Aijaz H Lone,Hanrui Li,Nazek El-Atab,Xiaohang Li,Hossein Fariborzi physics.app-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Yukun Yang,Peng Li
title: Synaptic Dynamics Realize First-order Adaptive Learning and Weight Symmetry
title_zh: 突触动力学实现一阶自适应学习和权重对称
abstract: Gradient-based first-order adaptive optimization methods such as the Adam optimizer are prevalent in training artificial networks, achieving the state-of-the-art results. This work attempts to answer the question whether it is viable for biological neural systems to adopt such optimization methods. To this end, we demonstrate a realization of the Adam optimizer using biologically-plausible mechanisms in synapses. The proposed learning rule has clear biological correspondence, runs continuously in time, and achieves performance to comparable Adam's. In addition, we present a new approach, inspired by the predisposition property of synapses observed in neuroscience, to circumvent the biological implausibility of the weight transport problem in backpropagation (BP). With only local information and no separate training phases, this method establishes and maintains weight symmetry in the forward and backward signaling paths, and is applicable to the proposed biologically plausible Adam learning rule. These mechanisms may shed light on the way in which biological synaptic dynamics facilitate learning.
summary: Gradient-based first-order adaptive optimization methods such as the Adam optimizer are prevalent in training artificial networks, achieving the state-of-the-art results. This work attempts to answer the question whether it is viable for biological neural systems to adopt such optimization methods. To this end, we demonstrate a realization of the Adam optimizer using biologically-plausible mechanisms in synapses. The proposed learning rule has clear biological correspondence, runs continuously in time, and achieves performance to comparable Adam's. In addition, we present a new approach, inspired by the predisposition property of synapses observed in neuroscience, to circumvent the biological implausibility of the weight transport problem in backpropagation (BP). With only local information and no separate training phases, this method establishes and maintains weight symmetry in the forward and backward signaling paths, and is applicable to the proposed biologically plausible Adam learning rule. These mechanisms may shed light on the way in which biological synaptic dynamics facilitate learning.
abstract_zh: 基于梯度的一阶自适应优化方法（例如 Adam 优化器）在训练人工网络中很普遍，取得了最先进的结果。这项工作试图回答生物神经系统采用这种优化方法是否可行的问题。为此，我们展示了 Adam 优化器在突触中使用生物学上合理的机制的实现。所提出的学习规则具有明确的生物学对应性，在时间上连续运行，并且达到了与 Adam 相当的性能。此外，受神经科学中观察到的突触倾向特性的启发，我们提出了一种新方法，以规避反向传播（BP）中重量传输问题的生物学不合理性。该方法仅使用局部信息且没有单独的训练阶段，在前向和后向信号路径中建立并维持权重对称性，并且适用于所提出的生物学上合理的 Adam 学习规则。这些机制可能揭示生物突触动力学促进学习的方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生物可解释机制的Adam优化器实现方法，并解决反向传播中的权重传输问题。
AI.motivation: 梯度下降类优化方法在人工智能中广泛应用，但生物神经系统的学习机制是否能实现类似优化尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过突触动态实现Adam优化器的生物可解释学习规则，并利用突触先验特性建立前向/反向信号路径的权重对称性。
AI.result: 所提方法在保持生物合理性的同时达到与Adam相当的性能，且无需额外训练阶段即可维持权重对称性。
AI.conclusion: 突触动态机制可能揭示生物神经系统实现学习的潜在原理，为类脑计算提供新思路。

authors_text: Jyri Maanpää,Iaroslav Melekhov,Josef Taher,Petri Manninen,Juha Hyyppä
title: Leveraging Road Area Semantic Segmentation with Auxiliary Steering Task
title_zh: 利用道路区域语义分割和辅助转向任务
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures (Supplementary material 6 pages, 3 figures). Author's accepted version of the contribution included in proceedings of the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP), 2022
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures (Supplementary material 6 pages, 3 figures). Author's accepted version of the contribution included in proceedings of the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP), 2022
abstract: Robustness of different pattern recognition methods is one of the key challenges in autonomous driving, especially when driving in the high variety of road environments and weather conditions, such as gravel roads and snowfall. Although one can collect data from these adverse conditions using cars equipped with sensors, it is quite tedious to annotate the data for training. In this work, we address this limitation and propose a CNN-based method that can leverage the steering wheel angle information to improve the road area semantic segmentation. As the steering wheel angle data can be easily acquired with the associated images, one could improve the accuracy of road area semantic segmentation by collecting data in new road environments without manual data annotation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on two challenging data sets for autonomous driving and show that when the steering task is used in our segmentation model training, it leads to a 0.1-2.9% gain in the road area mIoU (mean Intersection over Union) compared to the corresponding reference transfer learning model.
summary: Robustness of different pattern recognition methods is one of the key challenges in autonomous driving, especially when driving in the high variety of road environments and weather conditions, such as gravel roads and snowfall. Although one can collect data from these adverse conditions using cars equipped with sensors, it is quite tedious to annotate the data for training. In this work, we address this limitation and propose a CNN-based method that can leverage the steering wheel angle information to improve the road area semantic segmentation. As the steering wheel angle data can be easily acquired with the associated images, one could improve the accuracy of road area semantic segmentation by collecting data in new road environments without manual data annotation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on two challenging data sets for autonomous driving and show that when the steering task is used in our segmentation model training, it leads to a 0.1-2.9% gain in the road area mIoU (mean Intersection over Union) compared to the corresponding reference transfer learning model.
abstract_zh: 不同模式识别方法的鲁棒性是自动驾驶的关键挑战之一，特别是在碎石路和降雪等多种道路环境和天气条件下驾驶时。尽管可以使用配备传感器的汽车从这些不利条件下收集数据，但对数据进行注释以进行训练是相当繁琐的。在这项工作中，我们解决了这一限制，并提出了一种基于 CNN 的方法，可以利用方向盘角度信息来改进道路区域语义分割。由于方向盘角度数据可以通过关联图像轻松获取，因此可以通过在新的道路环境中收集数据来提高道路区域语义分割的准确性，而无需手动数据标注。我们在两个具有挑战性的自动驾驶数据集上证明了所提出方法的有效性，并表明当在我们的分割模型训练中使用转向任务时，与相应的参考迁移学习模型相比，它导致道路面积 mIoU（平均交集）增加 0.1-2.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN的道路区域语义分割方法，通过引入辅助转向任务来提升模型在复杂道路环境下的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中道路环境和天气条件复杂，传统方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而恶劣条件下数据采集与标注成本高昂，亟需降低对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 利用方向盘角度信息作为辅助任务，结合CNN模型进行联合训练，通过非标注数据提升道路区域语义分割效果。
AI.result: 在两个自动驾驶数据集上，相比迁移学习模型，道路区域mIoU指标提升0.1-2.9%。
AI.conclusion: 辅助转向任务能有效提升分割模型鲁棒性，为复杂环境下自动驾驶提供更高效的数据利用方案。

authors_text: Kenneth V. Price,Abhishek Kumar,Ponnuthurai N Suganthan
title: Trial-Based Dominance Enables Non-Parametric Tests to Compare both the Speed and Accuracy of Stochastic Optimizers
title_zh: 基于试验的优势使非参数测试能够比较随机优化器的速度和准确性
abstract: Non-parametric tests can determine the better of two stochastic optimization algorithms when benchmarking results are ordinal, like the final fitness values of multiple trials. For many benchmarks, however, a trial can also terminate once it reaches a pre-specified target value. When only some trials reach the target value, two variables characterize a trial's outcome: the time it takes to reach the target value (or not) and its final fitness value. This paper describes a simple way to impose linear order on this two-variable trial data set so that traditional non-parametric methods can determine the better algorithm when neither dominates. We illustrate the method with the Mann-Whitney U-test. A simulation demonstrates that U-scores are much more effective than dominance when tasked with identifying the better of two algorithms. We test U-scores by having them determine the winners of the CEC 2022 Special Session and Competition on Real-Parameter Numerical Optimization.
summary: Non-parametric tests can determine the better of two stochastic optimization algorithms when benchmarking results are ordinal, like the final fitness values of multiple trials. For many benchmarks, however, a trial can also terminate once it reaches a pre-specified target value. When only some trials reach the target value, two variables characterize a trial's outcome: the time it takes to reach the target value (or not) and its final fitness value. This paper describes a simple way to impose linear order on this two-variable trial data set so that traditional non-parametric methods can determine the better algorithm when neither dominates. We illustrate the method with the Mann-Whitney U-test. A simulation demonstrates that U-scores are much more effective than dominance when tasked with identifying the better of two algorithms. We test U-scores by having them determine the winners of the CEC 2022 Special Session and Competition on Real-Parameter Numerical Optimization.
abstract_zh: 当基准测试结果是有序的（例如多次试验的最终适应度值）时，非参数测试可以确定两种随机优化算法中的更好者。然而，对于许多基准来说，一旦达到预先指定的目标值，试验也可以终止。当只有一些试验达到目标值时，两个变量表征试验的结果：达到（或未达到）目标值所需的时间及其最终的适应度值。本文描述了一种简单的方法，对这个双变量试验数据集施加线性顺序，以便传统的非参数方法可以在两者都占主导地位时确定更好的算法。我们用曼-惠特尼 U 检验来说明该方法。模拟表明，当负责识别两种算法中更好的算法时，U 分数比优势更有效。我们通过让 U 分数确定 CEC 2022 特别会议和实参数数值优化竞赛的获胜者来测试 U 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于试验数据的线性排序方法，使非参数检验能够同时比较随机优化器的速度和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有非参数检验在处理部分试验达到目标值的场景时存在局限，无法有效比较算法的速度与精度。
AI.method: 通过为双变量试验数据（达成目标时间与最终适应度）构建线性序关系，结合Mann-Whitney U检验进行算法比较。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示U分数在识别优劣算法上显著优于支配关系，并在CEC 2022竞赛中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使传统非参数检验能同时评估优化器的收敛速度与精度，为算法比较提供更全面的分析框架。

search_text: Trial-Based Dominance Enables Non-Parametric Tests to Compare both the Speed and Accuracy of Stochastic Optimizers 基于试验的优势使非参数测试能够比较随机优化器的速度和准确性 Non-parametric tests can determine the better of two stochastic optimization algorithms when benchmarking results are ordinal, like the final fitness values of multiple trials. For many benchmarks, however, a trial can also terminate once it reaches a pre-specified target value. When only some trials reach the target value, two variables characterize a trial's outcome: the time it takes to reach the target value (or not) and its final fitness value. This paper describes a simple way to impose linear order on this two-variable trial data set so that traditional non-parametric methods can determine the better algorithm when neither dominates. We illustrate the method with the Mann-Whitney U-test. A simulation demonstrates that U-scores are much more effective than dominance when tasked with identifying the better of two algorithms. We test U-scores by having them determine the winners of the CEC 2022 Special Session and Competition on Real-Parameter Numerical Optimization. 当基准测试结果是有序的（例如多次试验的最终适应度值）时，非参数测试可以确定两种随机优化算法中的更好者。然而，对于许多基准来说，一旦达到预先指定的目标值，试验也可以终止。当只有一些试验达到目标值时，两个变量表征试验的结果：达到（或未达到）目标值所需的时间及其最终的适应度值。本文描述了一种简单的方法，对这个双变量试验数据集施加线性顺序，以便传统的非参数方法可以在两者都占主导地位时确定更好的算法。我们用曼-惠特尼 U 检验来说明该方法。模拟表明，当负责识别两种算法中更好的算法时，U 分数比优势更有效。我们通过让 U 分数确定 CEC 2022 特别会议和实参数数值优化竞赛的获胜者来测试 U 分数。 本文提出一种基于试验数据的线性排序方法，使非参数检验能够同时比较随机优化器的速度和准确性。 Kenneth V. Price,Abhishek Kumar,Ponnuthurai N Suganthan cs.AI,cs.NE,math.OC

authors_text: Daoguang Zan,Bei Chen,Fengji Zhang,Dianjie Lu,Bingchao Wu,Bei Guan,Yongji Wang,Jian-Guang Lou
title: Large Language Models Meet NL2Code: A Survey
title_zh: 大型语言模型满足 NL2Code：一项调查
comment: Accepted to the main conference of ACL 2023 (long paper)
comments: Accepted to the main conference of ACL 2023 (long paper)
abstract: The task of generating code from a natural language description, or NL2Code, is considered a pressing and significant challenge in code intelligence. Thanks to the rapid development of pre-training techniques, surging large language models are being proposed for code, sparking the advances in NL2Code. To facilitate further research and applications in this field, in this paper, we present a comprehensive survey of 27 existing large language models for NL2Code, and also review benchmarks and metrics. We provide an intuitive comparison of all existing models on the HumanEval benchmark. Through in-depth observation and analysis, we provide some insights and conclude that the key factors contributing to the success of large language models for NL2Code are "Large Size, Premium Data, Expert Tuning". In addition, we discuss challenges and opportunities regarding the gap between models and humans. We also create a website https://nl2code.github.io to track the latest progress through crowd-sourcing. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey of large language models for NL2Code, and we believe it will contribute to the ongoing development of the field.
summary: The task of generating code from a natural language description, or NL2Code, is considered a pressing and significant challenge in code intelligence. Thanks to the rapid development of pre-training techniques, surging large language models are being proposed for code, sparking the advances in NL2Code. We provide an intuitive comparison of all existing models on the HumanEval benchmark. Through in-depth observation and analysis, we provide some insights and conclude that the key factors contributing to the success of large language models for NL2Code are "Large Size, Premium Data, Expert Tuning". In addition, we discuss challenges and opportunities regarding the gap between models and humans. We also create a website https://nl2code.github.io to track the latest progress through crowd-sourcing. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey of large language models for NL2Code, and we believe it will contribute to the ongoing development of the field.
abstract_zh: 从自然语言描述（NL2Code）生成代码的任务被认为是代码智能领域的一项紧迫而重大的挑战。由于预训练技术的快速发展，越来越多的大型语言模型被提出用于代码，从而引发了 NL2Code 的进步。为了促进该领域的进一步研究和应用，在本文中，我们对 NL2Code 的 27 个现有大型语言模型进行了全面调查，并回顾了基准和指标。我们在 HumanEval 基准上对所有现有模型进行直观比较。通过深入观察和分析，我们得出一些见解并得出结论：NL2Code 大型语言模型成功的关键因素是“大尺寸、优质数据、专家调优”。此外，我们还讨论了模型与人类之间差距的挑战和机遇。我们还创建了一个网站 https://nl2code.github.io 来通过众包跟踪最新进展。据我们所知，这是对 NL2Code 大型语言模型的首次调查，我们相信它将有助于该领域的持续发展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了27个用于NL2Code任务的大语言模型，分析其性能并总结关键成功因素。
AI.motivation: 随着预训练技术发展，大语言模型在NL2Code领域取得进展，但需系统性总结以推动进一步研究。
AI.method: 收集并比较27个模型在HumanEval基准上的表现，回顾基准与指标，分析模型成功因素及人类与模型间的差距。
AI.result: 发现模型成功依赖于大尺寸、高质量数据和专家调优，并创建网站跟踪最新进展。
AI.conclusion: 本文为首个NL2Code大模型综述，为领域发展提供参考，同时指出模型与人类能力间的挑战与机遇。

authors_text: Hichem Sahbi
title: Training Lightweight Graph Convolutional Networks with Phase-field Models
title_zh: 使用相场模型训练轻量级图卷积网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.13616
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.13616
abstract: In this paper, we design lightweight graph convolutional networks (GCNs) using a particular class of regularizers, dubbed as phase-field models (PFMs). PFMs exhibit a bi-phase behavior using a particular ultra-local term that allows training both the topology and the weight parameters of GCNs as a part of a single "end-to-end" optimization problem. Our proposed solution also relies on a reparametrization that pushes the mask of the topology towards binary values leading to effective topology selection and high generalization while implementing any targeted pruning rate. Both masks and weights share the same set of latent variables and this further enhances the generalization power of the resulting lightweight GCNs. Extensive experiments conducted on the challenging task of skeleton-based recognition show the outperformance of PFMs against other staple regularizers as well as related lightweight design methods.
summary: In this paper, we design lightweight graph convolutional networks (GCNs) using a particular class of regularizers, dubbed as phase-field models (PFMs). PFMs exhibit a bi-phase behavior using a particular ultra-local term that allows training both the topology and the weight parameters of GCNs as a part of a single "end-to-end" optimization problem. Our proposed solution also relies on a reparametrization that pushes the mask of the topology towards binary values leading to effective topology selection and high generalization while implementing any targeted pruning rate. Both masks and weights share the same set of latent variables and this further enhances the generalization power of the resulting lightweight GCNs. Extensive experiments conducted on the challenging task of skeleton-based recognition show the outperformance of PFMs against other staple regularizers as well as related lightweight design methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用一类特殊的正则化器（称为相场模型（PFM））设计了轻量级图卷积网络（GCN）。 PFM 使用特定的超局部项表现出双相行为，允许将 GCN 的拓扑和权重参数训练为单个“端到端”优化问题的一部分。我们提出的解决方案还依赖于重新参数化，将拓扑的掩码推向二进制值，从而实现有效的拓扑选择和高度泛化，同时实现任何目标修剪率。掩码和权重共享同一组潜在变量，这进一步增强了轻量级 GCN 的泛化能力。针对基于骨架的识别这一具有挑战性的任务进行的大量实验表明，PFM 的性能优于其他主要正则化器以及相关的轻量级设计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用相场模型设计轻量级图卷积网络的方法，通过端到端优化同时学习网络拓扑结构和权重参数。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络在拓扑结构和权重参数优化上存在解耦问题，导致模型效率与泛化能力难以兼顾。
AI.method: 引入相场模型作为正则化器，通过超局部项实现拓扑与权重联合优化，并采用重参数化技术将拓扑掩码推向二值化以提升剪枝效果。
AI.result: 在骨骼动作识别任务中，所提方法在保持高精度的同时显著优于其他正则化方法和轻量化设计技术。
AI.conclusion: 相场模型为轻量级图神经网络设计提供了有效范式，通过联合优化拓扑与参数可实现更优的模型压缩与泛化性能。

authors_text: Zhujin Gao,Junliang Guo,Xu Tan,Yongxin Zhu,Fang Zhang,Jiang Bian,Linli Xu
title: Empowering Diffusion Models on the Embedding Space for Text Generation
title_zh: 增强嵌入空间上的扩散模型以生成文本
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art synthesis quality on both visual and audio tasks, and recent works further adapt them to textual data by diffusing on the embedding space. In this paper, we conduct systematic studies of the optimization challenges encountered with both the embedding space and the denoising model, which have not been carefully explored. Firstly, the data distribution is learnable for embeddings, which may lead to the collapse of the embedding space and unstable training. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new objective called the anchor loss which is more efficient than previous methods. Secondly, we find the noise levels of conventional schedules are insufficient for training a desirable denoising model while introducing varying degrees of degeneration in consequence. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework called noise rescaling. Based on the above analysis, we propose Difformer, an embedding diffusion model based on Transformer. Experiments on varieties of seminal text generation tasks show the effectiveness of the proposed methods and the superiority of Difformer over previous state-of-the-art embedding diffusion baselines.
summary: Diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art synthesis quality on both visual and audio tasks, and recent works further adapt them to textual data by diffusing on the embedding space. In this paper, we conduct systematic studies of the optimization challenges encountered with both the embedding space and the denoising model, which have not been carefully explored. Firstly, the data distribution is learnable for embeddings, which may lead to the collapse of the embedding space and unstable training. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new objective called the anchor loss which is more efficient than previous methods. Secondly, we find the noise levels of conventional schedules are insufficient for training a desirable denoising model while introducing varying degrees of degeneration in consequence. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework called noise rescaling. Based on the above analysis, we propose Difformer, an embedding diffusion model based on Transformer. Experiments on varieties of seminal text generation tasks show the effectiveness of the proposed methods and the superiority of Difformer over previous state-of-the-art embedding diffusion baselines.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在视觉和音频任务上都实现了最先进的合成质量，并且最近的工作通过在嵌入空间上扩散来进一步使其适应文本数据。在本文中，我们对嵌入空间和去噪模型遇到的优化挑战进行了系统的研究，这些挑战尚未得到仔细探索。首先，数据分布对于嵌入来说是可学习的，这可能导致嵌入空间崩溃和训练不稳定。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个称为锚损失的新目标，它比以前的方法更有效。其次，我们发现传统计划的噪声水平不足以训练理想的去噪模型，同时会导致不同程度的退化。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种称为噪声重新缩放的新颖框架。基于以上分析，我们提出了Difformer，一种基于Transformer的嵌入扩散模型。对各种开创性文本生成任务的实验表明了所提出方法的有效性以及 Difformer 相对于之前最先进的嵌入扩散基线的优越性。

AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在视觉和音频任务中表现出色，但其在文本生成中的应用仍面临嵌入空间分布学习和去噪模型训练的挑战，因此需要探索新的方法以提高性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的目标函数称为锚点损失以防止嵌入空间坍塌，并引入了噪声重缩放框架以优化噪声水平，最终基于Transformer架构提出了Difformer模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在多种文本生成任务中有效，并且Difformer优于现有的嵌入扩散模型基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过解决嵌入空间和去噪模型的优化问题，提出了Difformer模型，有效提升了文本生成的质量。

search_text: Empowering Diffusion Models on the Embedding Space for Text Generation 增强嵌入空间上的扩散模型以生成文本 Diffusion models have achieved state-of-the-art synthesis quality on both visual and audio tasks, and recent works further adapt them to textual data by diffusing on the embedding space. In this paper, we conduct systematic studies of the optimization challenges encountered with both the embedding space and the denoising model, which have not been carefully explored. Firstly, the data distribution is learnable for embeddings, which may lead to the collapse of the embedding space and unstable training. To alleviate this problem, we propose a new objective called the anchor loss which is more efficient than previous methods. Secondly, we find the noise levels of conventional schedules are insufficient for training a desirable denoising model while introducing varying degrees of degeneration in consequence. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework called noise rescaling. Based on the above analysis, we propose Difformer, an embedding diffusion model based on Transformer. Experiments on varieties of seminal text generation tasks show the effectiveness of the proposed methods and the superiority of Difformer over previous state-of-the-art embedding diffusion baselines. 扩散模型在视觉和音频任务上都实现了最先进的合成质量，并且最近的工作通过在嵌入空间上扩散来进一步使其适应文本数据。在本文中，我们对嵌入空间和去噪模型遇到的优化挑战进行了系统的研究，这些挑战尚未得到仔细探索。首先，数据分布对于嵌入来说是可学习的，这可能导致嵌入空间崩溃和训练不稳定。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个称为锚损失的新目标，它比以前的方法更有效。其次，我们发现传统计划的噪声水平不足以训练理想的去噪模型，同时会导致不同程度的退化。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种称为噪声重新缩放的新颖框架。基于以上分析，我们提出了Difformer，一种基于Transformer的嵌入扩散模型。对各种开创性文本生成任务的实验表明了所提出方法的有效性以及 Difformer 相对于之前最先进的嵌入扩散基线的优越性。 本文旨在通过在嵌入空间中增强扩散模型来改进文本生成任务。 Zhujin Gao,Junliang Guo,Xu Tan,Yongxin Zhu,Fang Zhang,Jiang Bian,Linli Xu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Feng Lin,Wenze Hu,Yaowei Wang,Yonghong Tian,Guangming Lu,Fanglin Chen,Yong Xu,Xiaoyu Wang
title: Universal Object Detection with Large Vision Model
title_zh: 具有大视觉模型的通用物体检测
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). The 2nd place in the object detection track of the Robust Vision Challenge (RVC 2022)
comments: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). The 2nd place in the object detection track of the Robust Vision Challenge (RVC 2022)
abstract: Over the past few years, there has been growing interest in developing a broad, universal, and general-purpose computer vision system. Such systems have the potential to address a wide range of vision tasks simultaneously, without being limited to specific problems or data domains. This universality is crucial for practical, real-world computer vision applications. In this study, our focus is on a specific challenge: the large-scale, multi-domain universal object detection problem, which contributes to the broader goal of achieving a universal vision system. This problem presents several intricate challenges, including cross-dataset category label duplication, label conflicts, and the necessity to handle hierarchical taxonomies. To address these challenges, we introduce our approach to label handling, hierarchy-aware loss design, and resource-efficient model training utilizing a pre-trained large vision model. Our method has demonstrated remarkable performance, securing a prestigious second-place ranking in the object detection track of the Robust Vision Challenge 2022 (RVC 2022) on a million-scale cross-dataset object detection benchmark. We believe that our comprehensive study will serve as a valuable reference and offer an alternative approach for addressing similar challenges within the computer vision community. The source code for our work is openly available at https://github.com/linfeng93/Large-UniDet.
summary: Over the past few years, there has been growing interest in developing a broad, universal, and general-purpose computer vision system. Such systems have the potential to address a wide range of vision tasks simultaneously, without being limited to specific problems or data domains. This universality is crucial for practical, real-world computer vision applications. In this study, our focus is on a specific challenge: the large-scale, multi-domain universal object detection problem, which contributes to the broader goal of achieving a universal vision system. This problem presents several intricate challenges, including cross-dataset category label duplication, label conflicts, and the necessity to handle hierarchical taxonomies. To address these challenges, we introduce our approach to label handling, hierarchy-aware loss design, and resource-efficient model training utilizing a pre-trained large vision model. Our method has demonstrated remarkable performance, securing a prestigious second-place ranking in the object detection track of the Robust Vision Challenge 2022 (RVC 2022) on a million-scale cross-dataset object detection benchmark. We believe that our comprehensive study will serve as a valuable reference and offer an alternative approach for addressing similar challenges within the computer vision community. The source code for our work is openly available at https://github.com/linfeng93/Large-UniDet.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们对开发广泛、通用和通用的计算机视觉系统越来越感兴趣。此类系统有潜力同时解决广泛的视觉任务，而不受特定问题或数据领域的限制。这种通用性对于实际的计算机视觉应用至关重要。在这项研究中，我们的重点是一个特定的挑战：大规模、多域通用目标检测问题，这有助于实现通用视觉系统的更广泛目标。这个问题带来了几个复杂的挑战，包括跨数据集类别标签重复、标签冲突以及处理分层分类法的必要性。为了应对这些挑战，我们介绍了标签处理、层次感知损失设计以及利用预先训练的大视觉模型进行资源高效的模型训练的方法。我们的方法表现出了卓越的性能，在 2022 年鲁棒视觉挑战赛 (RVC 2022) 的百万级跨数据集目标检测基准测试中，获得了享有盛誉的第二名。我们相信，我们的全面研究将作为有价值的参考，并为解决计算机视觉社区中的类似挑战提供替代方法。我们工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/linfeng93/Large-UniDet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决大规模、多领域的通用目标检测问题，以推动通用视觉系统的发展。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够处理多种视觉任务的通用系统，而非局限于特定问题或数据领域，这对实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 提出标签处理方法、层次感知损失设计，并利用预训练大视觉模型实现资源高效的模型训练。
AI.result: 在RVC 2022跨数据集目标检测基准测试中取得第二名，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究为通用视觉系统的挑战提供了参考方案，代码已开源供社区使用。

authors_text: Joern Ploennigs,Markus Berger
title: AI Art in Architecture
title_zh: 建筑中的人工智能艺术
abstract: Recent diffusion-based AI art platforms are able to create impressive images from simple text descriptions. This makes them powerful tools for concept design in any discipline that requires creativity in visual design tasks. This is also true for early stages of architectural design with multiple stages of ideation, sketching and modelling. In this paper, we investigate how applicable diffusion-based models already are to these tasks. We research the applicability of the platforms Midjourney, DALL-E 2 and StableDiffusion to a series of common use cases in architectural design to determine which are already solvable or might soon be. We also analyze how they are already being used by analyzing a data set of 40 million Midjourney queries with NLP methods to extract common usage patterns. With this insights we derived a workflow to interior and exterior design that combines the strengths of the individual platforms.
summary: Recent diffusion-based AI art platforms are able to create impressive images from simple text descriptions. This makes them powerful tools for concept design in any discipline that requires creativity in visual design tasks. This is also true for early stages of architectural design with multiple stages of ideation, sketching and modelling. In this paper, we investigate how applicable diffusion-based models already are to these tasks. We research the applicability of the platforms Midjourney, DALL-E 2 and StableDiffusion to a series of common use cases in architectural design to determine which are already solvable or might soon be. We also analyze how they are already being used by analyzing a data set of 40 million Midjourney queries with NLP methods to extract common usage patterns. With this insights we derived a workflow to interior and exterior design that combines the strengths of the individual platforms.
abstract_zh: 最近基于扩散的人工智能艺术平台能够从简单的文本描述中创建令人印象深刻的图像。这使得它们成为任何需要视觉设计任务创造力的学科中概念设计的强大工具。对于具有构思、草图和建模多个阶段的建筑设计的早期阶段也是如此。在本文中，我们研究了基于扩散的模型如何适用于这些任务。我们研究了 Midjourney、DALL-E 2 和 StableDiffusion 平台在架构设计中一系列常见用例的适用性，以确定哪些已经可以解决或可能很快可以解决。我们还通过 NLP 方法分析 4000 万个中途查询的数据集来提取常见的使用模式，从而分析它们的使用情况。有了这些见解，我们得出了一个内部和外部设计的工作流程，结合了各个平台的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于扩散模型的AI艺术平台在建筑领域的适用性，并提出了一个结合不同平台优势的工作流程。
AI.motivation: 由于AI艺术平台能够根据文本生成高质量图像，因此它们在需要创意视觉设计任务的领域（如建筑学）中具有广泛应用潜力。
AI.method: 研究者分析了Midjourney、DALL-E 2和StableDiffusion等平台在建筑设计中的适用性，并通过自然语言处理方法分析了4000万条Midjourney查询数据，提取常见使用模式。
AI.result: 研究发现这些AI平台可以用于建筑概念设计，并提出了一个结合各平台优势的内外部设计工作流程。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的AI艺术平台在建筑领域具有重要应用价值，未来可以进一步优化以提高设计效率和创意表现力。

conclusion: 基于扩散模型的AI艺术平台在建筑领域具有重要应用价值，未来可以进一步优化以提高设计效率和创意表现力。
search_text: AI Art in Architecture 建筑中的人工智能艺术 Recent diffusion-based AI art platforms are able to create impressive images from simple text descriptions. This makes them powerful tools for concept design in any discipline that requires creativity in visual design tasks. This is also true for early stages of architectural design with multiple stages of ideation, sketching and modelling. In this paper, we investigate how applicable diffusion-based models already are to these tasks. We research the applicability of the platforms Midjourney, DALL-E 2 and StableDiffusion to a series of common use cases in architectural design to determine which are already solvable or might soon be. We also analyze how they are already being used by analyzing a data set of 40 million Midjourney queries with NLP methods to extract common usage patterns. With this insights we derived a workflow to interior and exterior design that combines the strengths of the individual platforms. 最近基于扩散的人工智能艺术平台能够从简单的文本描述中创建令人印象深刻的图像。这使得它们成为任何需要视觉设计任务创造力的学科中概念设计的强大工具。对于具有构思、草图和建模多个阶段的建筑设计的早期阶段也是如此。在本文中，我们研究了基于扩散的模型如何适用于这些任务。我们研究了 Midjourney、DALL-E 2 和 StableDiffusion 平台在架构设计中一系列常见用例的适用性，以确定哪些已经可以解决或可能很快可以解决。我们还通过 NLP 方法分析 4000 万个中途查询的数据集来提取常见的使用模式，从而分析它们的使用情况。有了这些见解，我们得出了一个内部和外部设计的工作流程，结合了各个平台的优势。 本文探讨了基于扩散模型的AI艺术平台在建筑领域的适用性，并提出了一个结合不同平台优势的工作流程。 Joern Ploennigs,Markus Berger cs.AI

authors_text: Xiangdong Pei,Rui Zhang
title: Exploring a multi_stage feedback teaching mode for graduate students of software engineering discipline based on project_driven competition
title_zh: 基于项目驱动竞赛的软件工程学科研究生多阶段反馈教学模式探索
abstract: Aiming at the current problems of theory-oriented,practice-light,and lack of innovation ability in the teaching of postgraduate software engineering courses,a multi-stage feedback teaching mode for software engineering postgraduates based on competition project_driven is proposed. The model is driven by the competition project,and implementing suggestions are given in terms of stage allocation of software engineering course tasks and ability cultivation,competition case design and process evaluation improvement,etc. Through the implementation of this teaching mode,students enthusiasm and initiative are expected to be stimulated,and the overall development of students professional skills and comprehension ability would be improved to meet the demand of society for software engineering technical talents.
summary: Aiming at the current problems of theory-oriented,practice-light,and lack of innovation ability in the teaching of postgraduate software engineering courses,a multi-stage feedback teaching mode for software engineering postgraduates based on competition project_driven is proposed. The model is driven by the competition project,and implementing suggestions are given in terms of stage allocation of software engineering course tasks and ability cultivation,competition case design and process evaluation improvement,etc. Through the implementation of this teaching mode,students enthusiasm and initiative are expected to be stimulated,and the overall development of students professional skills and comprehension ability would be improved to meet the demand of society for software engineering technical talents.
abstract_zh: 【摘要】：针对当前软件工程研究生课程教学重理论、轻实践、创新能力不足的问题,提出一种基于竞赛项目驱动的软件工程研究生多阶段反馈教学模式。该模型以竞赛项目为驱动,从软件工程课程任务与能力培养的阶段性分配、竞赛案例设计以及过程评价改进等方面给出了实施建议。通过该教学模式的实施,有望激发学生的积极性和主动性,提高学生专业技能和理解能力的全面发展,满足社会对软件工程技术人才的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于竞赛项目驱动的多阶段反馈教学模式，旨在提升软件工程专业研究生的实践能力和创新水平。
AI.motivation: 当前软件工程研究生课程教学存在重理论、轻实践、缺乏创新力的问题，难以满足社会对技术人才的需求。
AI.method: 设计以竞赛项目为核心的多阶段教学框架，包含任务分阶段分配、能力培养、竞赛案例设计及过程评价优化等实施建议。
AI.result: 通过该模式激发学生主动性，提升专业技能与综合理解能力，实现教学与社会需求的对接。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段反馈教学模式有效解决了传统教学的不足，为培养高素质软件工程人才提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Yong Lai,Kuldeep S. Meel,Roland H. C. Yap
title: Fast Converging Anytime Model Counting
title_zh: 随时快速收敛模型计数
abstract: Model counting is a fundamental problem which has been influential in many applications, from artificial intelligence to formal verification. Due to the intrinsic hardness of model counting, approximate techniques have been developed to solve real-world instances of model counting. This paper designs a new anytime approach called PartialKC for approximate model counting. The idea is a form of partial knowledge compilation to provide an unbiased estimate of the model count which can converge to the exact count. Our empirical analysis demonstrates that PartialKC achieves significant scalability and accuracy over prior state-of-the-art approximate counters, including satss and STS. Interestingly, the empirical results show that PartialKC reaches convergence for many instances and therefore provides exact model counting performance comparable to state-of-the-art exact counters.
summary: Model counting is a fundamental problem which has been influential in many applications, from artificial intelligence to formal verification. Due to the intrinsic hardness of model counting, approximate techniques have been developed to solve real-world instances of model counting. This paper designs a new anytime approach called PartialKC for approximate model counting. The idea is a form of partial knowledge compilation to provide an unbiased estimate of the model count which can converge to the exact count. Our empirical analysis demonstrates that PartialKC achieves significant scalability and accuracy over prior state-of-the-art approximate counters, including satss and STS. Interestingly, the empirical results show that PartialKC reaches convergence for many instances and therefore provides exact model counting performance comparable to state-of-the-art exact counters.
abstract_zh: 模型计数是一个基本问题，在从人工智能到形式验证的许多应用中都具有影响力。由于模型计数的固有难度，已经开发了近似技术来解决模型计数的现实实例。本文设计了一种称为 PartialKC 的新方法，用于近似模型计数。这个想法是部分知识编译的一种形式，以提供模型计数的无偏估计，该估计可以收敛到精确计数。我们的实证分析表明，与之前最先进的近似计数器（包括 satss 和 STS）相比，PartialKC 实现了显着的可扩展性和准确性。有趣的是，实证结果表明 PartialKC 在许多情况下都达到了收敛，因此提供了与最先进的精确计数器相当的精确模型计数性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种名为PartialKC的快速收敛任何时间模型计数方法，通过部分知识编译提供无偏估计并能在多数实例上达到精确计数。
AI.motivation: 模型计数在AI和形式验证等领域至关重要，但其计算复杂度高，现有近似方法在准确性和效率间难以平衡，亟需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 提出PartialKC算法，结合部分知识编译技术生成无偏估计，通过迭代逐步收敛至精确解，融合近似与精确计数优势。
AI.result: 实证显示PartialKC在可扩展性和准确性上优于satss和STS等先进方法，且在多数实例中实现收敛，精确性媲美顶级精确计数器。
AI.conclusion: PartialKC有效平衡了近似与精确计数，为模型计数问题提供了更高效且准确的解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Xuancheng Huang,Zijun Liu,Peng Li,Tao Li,Maosong Sun,Yang Liu
title: An Extensible Plug-and-Play Method for Multi-Aspect Controllable Text Generation
title_zh: 一种可扩展的即插即用多方面可控文本生成方法
comment: long paper, accepted by ACL 2023 (main conference)
comments: long paper, accepted by ACL 2023 (main conference)
abstract: Recently, multi-aspect controllable text generation that controls the generated text in multiple aspects (e.g., sentiment, topic, and keywords) has attracted increasing attention. Although methods based on parameter efficient tuning like prefix-tuning could achieve multi-aspect controlling in a plug-and-play way, the mutual interference of multiple prefixes leads to significant degeneration of constraints and limits their extensibility to training-time unseen aspect combinations. In this work, we provide a theoretical lower bound for the interference and empirically found that the interference grows with the number of layers where prefixes are inserted. Based on these analyses, we propose using trainable gates to normalize the intervention of prefixes to restrain the growing interference. As a result, controlling training-time unseen combinations of aspects can be realized by simply concatenating corresponding plugins such that new constraints can be extended at a lower cost. In addition, we propose a unified way to process both categorical and free-form constraints. Experiments on text generation and machine translation demonstrate the superiority of our approach over baselines on constraint accuracy, text quality, and extensibility.
summary: Recently, multi-aspect controllable text generation that controls the generated text in multiple aspects (e.g., sentiment, topic, and keywords) has attracted increasing attention. Although methods based on parameter efficient tuning like prefix-tuning could achieve multi-aspect controlling in a plug-and-play way, the mutual interference of multiple prefixes leads to significant degeneration of constraints and limits their extensibility to training-time unseen aspect combinations. In this work, we provide a theoretical lower bound for the interference and empirically found that the interference grows with the number of layers where prefixes are inserted. Based on these analyses, we propose using trainable gates to normalize the intervention of prefixes to restrain the growing interference. As a result, controlling training-time unseen combinations of aspects can be realized by simply concatenating corresponding plugins such that new constraints can be extended at a lower cost. In addition, we propose a unified way to process both categorical and free-form constraints. Experiments on text generation and machine translation demonstrate the superiority of our approach over baselines on constraint accuracy, text quality, and extensibility.
abstract_zh: 近年来，从多个方面（例如情感、主题和关键词）控制生成文本的多方面可控文本生成引起了越来越多的关注。虽然基于参数有效调整的方法（如前缀调整）可以以即插即用的方式实现多方面控制，但多个前缀的相互干扰会导致约束的显着退化，并限制其对训练时看不见的方面组合的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提供了干扰的理论下限，并根据经验发现干扰随着插入前缀的层数而增加。基于这些分析，我们建议使用可训练门来规范前缀的干预，以抑制日益增长的干扰。因此，可以通过简单地连接相应的插件来实现控制训练时未见的方面组合，从而可以以较低的成本扩展新的约束。此外，我们提出了一种统一的方法来处理分类约束和自由形式约束。文本生成和机器翻译的实验证明了我们的方法在约束准确性、文本质量和可扩展性方面优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的即插即用方法，用于多方面可控文本生成，解决多约束条件下的生成质量与扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于参数高效微调的方法在多方面控制时存在前缀相互干扰问题，导致约束退化且难以扩展至训练时未见过的组合。
AI.method: 通过理论分析干扰下界，提出使用可训练门控机制归一化前缀干预，并设计统一处理分类与自由形式约束的框架。
AI.result: 在文本生成与机器翻译任务中，相较基线方法在约束准确性、文本质量及扩展性指标上均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效抑制多前缀干扰，实现低成本扩展新约束组合，为多方面可控生成提供通用解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的即插即用方法，用于多方面可控文本生成，解决多约束条件下的生成质量与扩展性问题。

search_text: An Extensible Plug-and-Play Method for Multi-Aspect Controllable Text Generation 一种可扩展的即插即用多方面可控文本生成方法 Recently, multi-aspect controllable text generation that controls the generated text in multiple aspects (e.g., sentiment, topic, and keywords) has attracted increasing attention. Although methods based on parameter efficient tuning like prefix-tuning could achieve multi-aspect controlling in a plug-and-play way, the mutual interference of multiple prefixes leads to significant degeneration of constraints and limits their extensibility to training-time unseen aspect combinations. In this work, we provide a theoretical lower bound for the interference and empirically found that the interference grows with the number of layers where prefixes are inserted. Based on these analyses, we propose using trainable gates to normalize the intervention of prefixes to restrain the growing interference. As a result, controlling training-time unseen combinations of aspects can be realized by simply concatenating corresponding plugins such that new constraints can be extended at a lower cost. In addition, we propose a unified way to process both categorical and free-form constraints. Experiments on text generation and machine translation demonstrate the superiority of our approach over baselines on constraint accuracy, text quality, and extensibility. 近年来，从多个方面（例如情感、主题和关键词）控制生成文本的多方面可控文本生成引起了越来越多的关注。虽然基于参数有效调整的方法（如前缀调整）可以以即插即用的方式实现多方面控制，但多个前缀的相互干扰会导致约束的显着退化，并限制其对训练时看不见的方面组合的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提供了干扰的理论下限，并根据经验发现干扰随着插入前缀的层数而增加。基于这些分析，我们建议使用可训练门来规范前缀的干预，以抑制日益增长的干扰。因此，可以通过简单地连接相应的插件来实现控制训练时未见的方面组合，从而可以以较低的成本扩展新的约束。此外，我们提出了一种统一的方法来处理分类约束和自由形式约束。文本生成和机器翻译的实验证明了我们的方法在约束准确性、文本质量和可扩展性方面优于基线。 本文提出一种可扩展的即插即用方法，用于多方面可控文本生成，解决多约束条件下的生成质量与扩展性问题。 Xuancheng Huang,Zijun Liu,Peng Li,Tao Li,Maosong Sun,Yang Liu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Joseph Levitas,Konstantin Yavilberg,Oleg Korol,Genadi Man
title: Prediction of Auto Insurance Risk Based on t-SNE Dimensionality Reduction
title_zh: 基于t-SNE降维的车险风险预测
abstract: Correct risk estimation of policyholders is of great significance to auto insurance companies. While the current tools used in this field have been proven in practice to be quite efficient and beneficial, we argue that there is still a lot of room for development and improvement in the auto insurance risk estimation process. To this end, we develop a framework based on a combination of a neural network together with a dimensionality reduction technique t-SNE (t-distributed stochastic neighbour embedding). This enables us to visually represent the complex structure of the risk as a two-dimensional surface, while still preserving the properties of the local region in the features space. The obtained results, which are based on real insurance data, reveal a clear contrast between the high and the low risk policy holders, and indeed improve upon the actual risk estimation performed by the insurer. Due to the visual accessibility of the portfolio in this approach, we argue that this framework could be advantageous to the auto insurer, both as a main risk prediction tool and as an additional validation stage in other approaches.
summary: Correct risk estimation of policyholders is of great significance to auto insurance companies. While the current tools used in this field have been proven in practice to be quite efficient and beneficial, we argue that there is still a lot of room for development and improvement in the auto insurance risk estimation process. To this end, we develop a framework based on a combination of a neural network together with a dimensionality reduction technique t-SNE (t-distributed stochastic neighbour embedding). This enables us to visually represent the complex structure of the risk as a two-dimensional surface, while still preserving the properties of the local region in the features space. The obtained results, which are based on real insurance data, reveal a clear contrast between the high and the low risk policy holders, and indeed improve upon the actual risk estimation performed by the insurer. Due to the visual accessibility of the portfolio in this approach, we argue that this framework could be advantageous to the auto insurer, both as a main risk prediction tool and as an additional validation stage in other approaches.
abstract_zh: 投保人正确的风险评估对于车险公司具有重要意义。虽然该领域当前使用的工具已被实践证明非常有效和有益，但我们认为车险风险评估流程仍有很大的发展和改进空间。为此，我们开发了一个基于神经网络与降维技术 t-SNE（t 分布随机邻域嵌入）相结合的框架。这使我们能够将风险的复杂结构直观地表示为二维表面，同时仍然保留特征空间中局部区域的属性。所获得的结果基于真实的保险数据，揭示了高风险和低风险保单持有人之间的明显对比，并且确实改进了保险公司进行的实际风险估计。由于这种方法中投资组合的可视化可访问性，我们认为该框架对于汽车保险公司来说可能是有利的，既可以作为主要的风险预测工具，也可以作为其他方法中的附加验证阶段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合神经网络与t-SNE降维技术的框架，用于可视化汽车保险风险结构并提升风险预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有风险评估工具效率虽高，但缺乏直观可视化手段，难以有效区分高风险与低风险客户，需改进风险预测与验证方式。
AI.method: 采用神经网络进行风险预测，结合t-SNE降维将高维特征数据映射为二维可视化表示，保留局部特征空间特性。
AI.result: 基于真实保险数据的实验显示，该方法能清晰区分高风险与低风险客户，预测结果优于保险公司现有评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可作为汽车保险风险预测的主要工具及其它方法的验证补充，提升风险评估的直观性与准确性。

authors_text: Jianwu Fang,Lei-Lei Li,Kuan Yang,Zhedong Zheng,Jianru Xue,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Cognitive Accident Prediction in Driving Scenes: A Multimodality Benchmark
title_zh: 驾驶场景中的认知事故预测：多模态基准
abstract: Traffic accident prediction in driving videos aims to provide an early warning of the accident occurrence, and supports the decision making of safe driving systems. Previous works usually concentrate on the spatial-temporal correlation of object-level context, while they do not fit the inherent long-tailed data distribution well and are vulnerable to severe environmental change. In this work, we propose a Cognitive Accident Prediction (CAP) method that explicitly leverages human-inspired cognition of text description on the visual observation and the driver attention to facilitate model training. In particular, the text description provides a dense semantic description guidance for the primary context of the traffic scene, while the driver attention provides a traction to focus on the critical region closely correlating with safe driving. CAP is formulated by an attentive text-to-vision shift fusion module, an attentive scene context transfer module, and the driver attention guided accident prediction module. We leverage the attention mechanism in these modules to explore the core semantic cues for accident prediction. In order to train CAP, we extend an existing self-collected DADA-2000 dataset (with annotated driver attention for each frame) with further factual text descriptions for the visual observations before the accidents. Besides, we construct a new large-scale benchmark consisting of 11,727 in-the-wild accident videos with over 2.19 million frames (named as CAP-DATA) together with labeled fact-effect-reason-introspection description and temporal accident frame label. Based on extensive experiments, the superiority of CAP is validated compared with state-of-the-art approaches. The code, CAP-DATA, and all results will be released in \url{https://github.com/JWFanggit/LOTVS-CAP}.
summary: Traffic accident prediction in driving videos aims to provide an early warning of the accident occurrence, and supports the decision making of safe driving systems. Previous works usually concentrate on the spatial-temporal correlation of object-level context, while they do not fit the inherent long-tailed data distribution well and are vulnerable to severe environmental change. In this work, we propose a Cognitive Accident Prediction (CAP) method that explicitly leverages human-inspired cognition of text description on the visual observation and the driver attention to facilitate model training. In particular, the text description provides a dense semantic description guidance for the primary context of the traffic scene, while the driver attention provides a traction to focus on the critical region closely correlating with safe driving. CAP is formulated by an attentive text-to-vision shift fusion module, an attentive scene context transfer module, and the driver attention guided accident prediction module. We leverage the attention mechanism in these modules to explore the core semantic cues for accident prediction. In order to train CAP, we extend an existing self-collected DADA-2000 dataset (with annotated driver attention for each frame) with further factual text descriptions for the visual observations before the accidents. Besides, we construct a new large-scale benchmark consisting of 11,727 in-the-wild accident videos with over 2.19 million frames (named as CAP-DATA) together with labeled fact-effect-reason-introspection description and temporal accident frame label. Based on extensive experiments, the superiority of CAP is validated compared with state-of-the-art approaches. The code, CAP-DATA, and all results will be released in \url{https://github.com/JWFanggit/LOTVS-CAP}.
abstract_zh: 驾驶视频中的交通事故预测旨在对事故发生进行早期预警，并支持安全驾驶系统的决策。以往的工作通常集中于对象级上下文的时空相关性，但不能很好地适应固有的长尾数据分布，并且容易受到严重环境变化的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种认知事故预测（CAP）方法，该方法明确利用人类对视觉观察和驾驶员注意力的文本描述的认知来促进模型训练。特别是，文本描述为交通场景的主要上下文提供了密集的语义描述指导，而驾驶员注意力则提供了牵引力来关注与安全驾驶密切相关的关键区域。 CAP 由注意力文本到视觉转换融合模块、注意力场景上下文传输模块和驾驶员注意力引导事故预测模块组成。我们利用这些模块中的注意力机制来探索事故预测的核心语义线索。为了训练 CAP，我们扩展了现有的自行收集的 DADA-2000 数据集（每帧都带有注释的驾驶员注意力），并为事故前的视觉观察提供了进一步的事实文本描述。此外，我们构建了一个新的大规模基准，由 11,727 个超过 219 万帧的野外事故视频（称为 CAP-DATA）以及带标签的事实-影响-原因-内省描述和时间事故帧标签组成。基于大量的实验，与最先进的方法相比，CAP 的优越性得到了验证。代码、CAP-DATA 和所有结果将在 \url{https://github.com/JWFanggit/LOTVS-CAP} 中发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态数据的认知交通事故预测方法CAP，通过融合文本描述和驾驶员注意力机制提升驾驶场景中的事故预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理交通视频中的长尾数据分布和环境变化时表现不足，缺乏对人类认知机制的有效利用，难以准确捕捉关键语义线索。
AI.method: 设计包含文本-视觉注意力融合模块、场景上下文迁移模块和驾驶员注意力引导预测模块的CAP框架，结合扩展的DADA-2000数据集与新构建的CAP-DATA基准数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明CAP在事故预测任务上优于现有最先进方法，且代码、数据集和结果已公开发布。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入人类认知启发的多模态融合机制，CAP有效提升了复杂驾驶场景下的事故预测能力，为安全驾驶系统提供了新的研究基准。

conclusion: 通过引入人类认知启发的多模态融合机制，CAP有效提升了复杂驾驶场景下的事故预测能力，为安全驾驶系统提供了新的研究基准。
search_text: Cognitive Accident Prediction in Driving Scenes: A Multimodality Benchmark 驾驶场景中的认知事故预测：多模态基准 Traffic accident prediction in driving videos aims to provide an early warning of the accident occurrence, and supports the decision making of safe driving systems. Previous works usually concentrate on the spatial-temporal correlation of object-level context, while they do not fit the inherent long-tailed data distribution well and are vulnerable to severe environmental change. In this work, we propose a Cognitive Accident Prediction (CAP) method that explicitly leverages human-inspired cognition of text description on the visual observation and the driver attention to facilitate model training. In particular, the text description provides a dense semantic description guidance for the primary context of the traffic scene, while the driver attention provides a traction to focus on the critical region closely correlating with safe driving. CAP is formulated by an attentive text-to-vision shift fusion module, an attentive scene context transfer module, and the driver attention guided accident prediction module. We leverage the attention mechanism in these modules to explore the core semantic cues for accident prediction. In order to train CAP, we extend an existing self-collected DADA-2000 dataset (with annotated driver attention for each frame) with further factual text descriptions for the visual observations before the accidents. Besides, we construct a new large-scale benchmark consisting of 11,727 in-the-wild accident videos with over 2.19 million frames (named as CAP-DATA) together with labeled fact-effect-reason-introspection description and temporal accident frame label. Based on extensive experiments, the superiority of CAP is validated compared with state-of-the-art approaches. The code, CAP-DATA, and all results will be released in \url{https://github.com/JWFanggit/LOTVS-CAP}. 驾驶视频中的交通事故预测旨在对事故发生进行早期预警，并支持安全驾驶系统的决策。以往的工作通常集中于对象级上下文的时空相关性，但不能很好地适应固有的长尾数据分布，并且容易受到严重环境变化的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种认知事故预测（CAP）方法，该方法明确利用人类对视觉观察和驾驶员注意力的文本描述的认知来促进模型训练。特别是，文本描述为交通场景的主要上下文提供了密集的语义描述指导，而驾驶员注意力则提供了牵引力来关注与安全驾驶密切相关的关键区域。 CAP 由注意力文本到视觉转换融合模块、注意力场景上下文传输模块和驾驶员注意力引导事故预测模块组成。我们利用这些模块中的注意力机制来探索事故预测的核心语义线索。为了训练 CAP，我们扩展了现有的自行收集的 DADA-2000 数据集（每帧都带有注释的驾驶员注意力），并为事故前的视觉观察提供了进一步的事实文本描述。此外，我们构建了一个新的大规模基准，由 11,727 个超过 219 万帧的野外事故视频（称为 CAP-DATA）以及带标签的事实-影响-原因-内省描述和时间事故帧标签组成。基于大量的实验，与最先进的方法相比，CAP 的优越性得到了验证。代码、CAP-DATA 和所有结果将在 \url{https://github.com/JWFanggit/LOTVS-CAP} 中发布。 本文提出一种基于多模态数据的认知交通事故预测方法CAP，通过融合文本描述和驾驶员注意力机制提升驾驶场景中的事故预测性能。 Jianwu Fang,Lei-Lei Li,Kuan Yang,Zhedong Zheng,Jianru Xue,Tat-Seng Chua cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jan Pichl,Petr Marek,Jakub Konrád,Petr Lorenc,Ondřej Kobza,Tomáš Zajíček,Jan Šedivý
title: Flowstorm: Open-Source Platform with Hybrid Dialogue Architecture
title_zh: Flowstorm：具有混合对话架构的开源平台
abstract: This paper presents a conversational AI platform called Flowstorm. Flowstorm is an open-source SaaS project suitable for creating, running, and analyzing conversational applications. Thanks to the fast and fully automated build process, the dialogues created within the platform can be executed in seconds. Furthermore, we propose a novel dialogue architecture that uses a combination of tree structures with generative models. The tree structures are also used for training NLU models suitable for specific dialogue scenarios. However, the generative models are globally used across applications and extend the functionality of the dialogue trees. Moreover, the platform functionality benefits from out-of-the-box components, such as the one responsible for extracting data from utterances or working with crawled data. Additionally, it can be extended using a custom code directly in the platform. One of the essential features of the platform is the possibility to reuse the created assets across applications. There is a library of prepared assets where each developer can contribute. All of the features are available through a user-friendly visual editor.
summary: This paper presents a conversational AI platform called Flowstorm. Flowstorm is an open-source SaaS project suitable for creating, running, and analyzing conversational applications. Thanks to the fast and fully automated build process, the dialogues created within the platform can be executed in seconds. Furthermore, we propose a novel dialogue architecture that uses a combination of tree structures with generative models. The tree structures are also used for training NLU models suitable for specific dialogue scenarios. However, the generative models are globally used across applications and extend the functionality of the dialogue trees. Moreover, the platform functionality benefits from out-of-the-box components, such as the one responsible for extracting data from utterances or working with crawled data. Additionally, it can be extended using a custom code directly in the platform. One of the essential features of the platform is the possibility to reuse the created assets across applications. There is a library of prepared assets where each developer can contribute. All of the features are available through a user-friendly visual editor.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个名为 Flowstorm 的对话式人工智能平台。 Flowstorm 是一个开源 SaaS 项目，适合创建、运行和分析会话应用程序。由于快速且完全自动化的构建过程，平台内创建的对话可以在几秒钟内执行。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的对话架构，该架构使用树结构与生成模型的组合。树结构还用于训练适合特定对话场景的 NLU 模型。然而，生成模型在应用程序中全局使用，并扩展了对话树的功能。此外，该平台功能受益于开箱即用的组件，例如负责从话语中提取数据或处理爬网数据的组件。此外，它可以直接在平台中使用自定义代码进行扩展。该平台的基本功能之一是可以跨应用程序重用创建的资产。有一个准备好的资源库，每个开发人员都可以做出贡献。所有功能都可以通过用户友好的可视化编辑器使用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Flowstorm的开源对话AI平台，该平台结合了树状结构与生成模型的混合对话架构，支持快速构建和分析对话应用。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统在灵活性和扩展性上存在不足，亟需一个支持模块化复用、自动化构建且易于扩展的开放平台以满足多样化场景需求。
AI.method: 提出混合架构：使用树状结构处理特定场景的NLU训练，同时通过全局生成模型增强对话功能；集成数据提取、爬取数据处理等开箱即用组件，并支持自定义代码扩展。
AI.result: 实现对话应用秒级部署，资产可跨应用复用，开源社区贡献组件库，可视化编辑器降低使用门槛。
AI.conclusion: Flowstorm通过混合架构与开源生态为对话系统开发提供了高效、灵活的新范式，推动了模块化对话技术的发展。

authors_text: Peter Mortimer,Hans-Joachim Wuensche
title: TAS-NIR: A VIS+NIR Dataset for Fine-grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Environments
title_zh: TAS-NIR：用于非结构化户外环境中细粒度语义分割的 VIS+NIR 数据集
abstract: Vegetation Indices based on paired images of the visible color spectrum (VIS) and near infrared spectrum (NIR) have been widely used in remote sensing applications. These vegetation indices are extended for their application in autonomous driving in unstructured outdoor environments. In this domain we can combine traditional vegetation indices like the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) and Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) pre-trained on available VIS datasets. By laying a focus on learning calibrated CNN outputs, we can provide an approach to fuse known hand-crafted image features with CNN predictions for different domains as well. The method is evaluated on a VIS+NIR dataset of semantically annotated images in unstructured outdoor environments. The dataset is available at mucar3.de/iros2022-ppniv-tas-nir.
summary: Vegetation Indices based on paired images of the visible color spectrum (VIS) and near infrared spectrum (NIR) have been widely used in remote sensing applications. These vegetation indices are extended for their application in autonomous driving in unstructured outdoor environments. In this domain we can combine traditional vegetation indices like the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) and Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) pre-trained on available VIS datasets. By laying a focus on learning calibrated CNN outputs, we can provide an approach to fuse known hand-crafted image features with CNN predictions for different domains as well. The method is evaluated on a VIS+NIR dataset of semantically annotated images in unstructured outdoor environments. The dataset is available at mucar3.de/iros2022-ppniv-tas-nir.
abstract_zh: 基于可见色谱 (VIS) 和近红外光谱 (NIR) 配对图像的植被指数已广泛应用于遥感应用。这些植被指数被扩展用于非结构化室外环境中自动驾驶的应用。在此领域中，我们可以将归一化植被指数 (NDVI) 和增强型植被指数 (EVI) 等传统植被指数与在可用 VIS 数据集上预训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 结合起来。通过专注于学习校准的 CNN 输出，我们可以提供一种方法，将已知的手工制作的图像特征与不同领域的 CNN 预测融合起来。该方法在非结构化户外环境中语义注释图像的 VIS+NIR 数据集上进行评估。该数据集可在 mucar3.de/iros2022-ppniv-tas-nir 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAS-NIR数据集，结合可见光（VIS）和近红外（NIR）图像，用于无结构户外环境中的细粒度语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统植被指数（如NDVI、EVI）在遥感领域应用广泛，但自动驾驶等无结构户外场景中需更精确的语义分割方法，需融合传统特征与深度学习模型。
AI.method: 通过结合VIS+NIR图像数据集，将预训练CNN与传统植被指数特征融合，利用校准的CNN输出提升分割性能，并在新数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 构建了包含语义标注的VIS+NIR数据集（mucar3.de/iros2022-ppniv-tas-nir），验证了融合传统特征与CNN预测的方法在户外环境中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: TAS-NIR数据集为无结构户外环境的语义分割提供了新资源，证明了传统植被指数与深度学习模型融合的潜力。

authors_text: Guner Dilsad ER,Mustafa Mert Ankarali
title: Stochastic stability analysis of legged locomotion using unscented transformation
title_zh: 使用无味变换的腿运动随机稳定性分析
abstract: In this manuscript, we present a novel method for estimating the stochastic stability characteristics of metastable legged systems using the unscented transformation. Prior methods for stability analysis in such systems often required high-dimensional state space discretization and a broad set of initial conditions, resulting in significant computational complexity. Our approach aims to alleviate this issue by reducing the dimensionality of the system and utilizing the unscented transformation to estimate the output distribution. This technique allows us to account for multiple sources of uncertainty and high-dimensional system dynamics, while leveraging prior knowledge of noise statistics to inform the selection of initial conditions for experiments. As a result, our method enables the efficient assessment of controller performance and analysis of parametric dependencies with fewer experiments. To demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method, we apply it to the analysis of a one-dimensional hopper and an underactuated bipedal walking simulation with a hybrid zero dynamics controller.
summary: In this manuscript, we present a novel method for estimating the stochastic stability characteristics of metastable legged systems using the unscented transformation. Prior methods for stability analysis in such systems often required high-dimensional state space discretization and a broad set of initial conditions, resulting in significant computational complexity. Our approach aims to alleviate this issue by reducing the dimensionality of the system and utilizing the unscented transformation to estimate the output distribution. This technique allows us to account for multiple sources of uncertainty and high-dimensional system dynamics, while leveraging prior knowledge of noise statistics to inform the selection of initial conditions for experiments. As a result, our method enables the efficient assessment of controller performance and analysis of parametric dependencies with fewer experiments. To demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method, we apply it to the analysis of a one-dimensional hopper and an underactuated bipedal walking simulation with a hybrid zero dynamics controller.
abstract_zh: 在这篇手稿中，我们提出了一种使用无味变换来估计亚稳态腿系统的随机稳定性特征的新方法。此类系统中的现有稳定性分析方法通常需要高维状态空间离散化和广泛的初始条件，从而导致计算复杂性很高。我们的方法旨在通过降低系统的维数并利用无味变换来估计输出分布来缓解这个问题。这项技术使我们能够解释不确定性和高维系统动力学的多个来源，同时利用噪声统计的先验知识来选择实验的初始条件。因此，我们的方法可以通过更少的实验来有效评估控制器性能并分析参数依赖性。为了证明我们提出的方法的有效性，我们将其应用于一维料斗的分析和使用混合零动态控制器的欠驱动双足步行模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无味变换的方法，用于评估腿式系统的随机稳定性特性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因高维状态空间离散化和大量初始条件需求导致计算复杂度高，需更高效分析腿式系统稳定性。
AI.method: 通过降维处理和无味变换估计输出分布，结合噪声统计先验知识优化初始条件选择。
AI.result: 方法在单维度跳跃器和欠驱动双足行走模拟中验证有效，可减少实验次数并高效评估控制器性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法降低了计算复杂度，为腿式机器人稳定性分析提供更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yonghao Xu,Tao Bai,Weikang Yu,Shizhen Chang,Peter M. Atkinson,Pedram Ghamisi
title: AI Security for Geoscience and Remote Sensing: Challenges and Future Trends
title_zh: 地球科学和遥感的人工智能安全：挑战和未来趋势
comment: ef:IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine, Volume 11, Issue 2, Pages 60-85, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine, Volume 11, Issue 2, Pages 60-85, 2023
abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have significantly intensified research in the geoscience and remote sensing (RS) field. AI algorithms, especially deep learning-based ones, have been developed and applied widely to RS data analysis. The successful application of AI covers almost all aspects of Earth observation (EO) missions, from low-level vision tasks like super-resolution, denoising and inpainting, to high-level vision tasks like scene classification, object detection and semantic segmentation. While AI techniques enable researchers to observe and understand the Earth more accurately, the vulnerability and uncertainty of AI models deserve further attention, considering that many geoscience and RS tasks are highly safety-critical. This paper reviews the current development of AI security in the geoscience and RS field, covering the following five important aspects: adversarial attack, backdoor attack, federated learning, uncertainty and explainability. Moreover, the potential opportunities and trends are discussed to provide insights for future research. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this paper is the first attempt to provide a systematic review of AI security-related research in the geoscience and RS community. Available code and datasets are also listed in the paper to move this vibrant field of research forward.
summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have significantly intensified research in the geoscience and remote sensing (RS) field.
