While AI techniques enable researchers to observe and understand the Earth more accurately, the vulnerability and uncertainty of AI models deserve further attention, considering that many geoscience and RS tasks are highly safety-critical. This paper reviews the current development of AI security in the geoscience and RS field, covering the following five important aspects: adversarial attack, backdoor attack, federated learning, uncertainty and explainability. Moreover, the potential opportunities and trends are discussed to provide insights for future research. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this paper is the first attempt to provide a systematic review of AI security-related research in the geoscience and RS community. Available code and datasets are also listed in the paper to move this vibrant field of research forward.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的最新进展显着加强了地球科学和遥感（RS）领域的研究。人工智能算法，特别是基于深度学习的算法，已被开发并广泛应用于遥感数据分析。人工智能的成功应用几乎涵盖了对地观测（EO）任务的所有方面，从超分辨率、去噪和修复等低级视觉任务，到场景分类、物体检测和语义分割等高级视觉任务。虽然人工智能技术使研究人员能够更准确地观察和了解地球，但考虑到许多地球科学和遥感任务的安全性非常关键，人工智能模型的脆弱性和不确定性值得进一步关注。本文回顾了当前地球科学和遥感领域人工智能安全的发展，涵盖以下五个重要方面：对抗性攻击、后门攻击、联邦学习、不确定性和可解释性。此外，还讨论了潜在的机会和趋势，为未来的研究提供见解。据作者所知，本文是对地球科学和遥感领域人工智能安全相关研究进行系统综述的首次尝试。论文中还列出了可用的代码和数据集，以推动这一充满活力的研究领域向前发展。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了人工智能安全在地球科学与遥感领域的研究现状，涵盖对抗攻击、后门攻击、联邦学习、不确定性与可解释性五个方面，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI技术显著提升了地球观测任务的准确性，但其模型脆弱性和不确定性在安全关键型任务中可能引发风险，亟需系统性研究以保障可靠性。
AI.method: 通过梳理现有文献，聚焦五大安全议题进行分类分析，并汇总公开代码与数据集以推动领域发展。
AI.result: 首次系统总结AI安全在遥感领域的挑战与趋势，提出跨学科合作方向，并提供资源清单加速后续研究。
AI.conclusion: AI安全是保障地球观测任务可信性的核心课题，未来需加强鲁棒性设计与跨领域协同创新。

authors_text: Siqi Ouyang,Rong Ye,Lei Li
title: WACO: Word-Aligned Contrastive Learning for Speech Translation
title_zh: WACO：语音翻译的词对齐对比学习
abstract: End-to-end Speech Translation (E2E ST) aims to directly translate source speech into target text. Existing ST methods perform poorly when only extremely small speech-text data are available for training. We observe that an ST model's performance closely correlates with its embedding similarity between speech and source transcript. In this paper, we propose Word-Aligned COntrastive learning (WACO), a simple and effective method for extremely low-resource speech-to-text translation. Our key idea is bridging word-level representations for both speech and text modalities via contrastive learning. We evaluate WACO and other methods on the MuST-C dataset, a widely used ST benchmark, and on a low-resource direction Maltese-English from IWSLT 2023. Our experiments demonstrate that WACO outperforms the best baseline by 9+ BLEU points with only 1-hour parallel ST data. Code is available at https://github.com/owaski/WACO.
summary: End-to-end Speech Translation (E2E ST) aims to directly translate source speech into target text. Existing ST methods perform poorly when only extremely small speech-text data are available for training. We observe that an ST model's performance closely correlates with its embedding similarity between speech and source transcript. In this paper, we propose Word-Aligned COntrastive learning (WACO), a simple and effective method for extremely low-resource speech-to-text translation. Our key idea is bridging word-level representations for both speech and text modalities via contrastive learning. We evaluate WACO and other methods on the MuST-C dataset, a widely used ST benchmark, and on a low-resource direction Maltese-English from IWSLT 2023. Our experiments demonstrate that WACO outperforms the best baseline by 9+ BLEU points with only 1-hour parallel ST data. Code is available at https://github.com/owaski/WACO.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音翻译（E2E ST）旨在将源语音直接翻译为目标文本。当只有极小的语音文本数据可用于训练时，现有的 ST 方法表现不佳。我们观察到 ST 模型的性能与其语音和源转录本之间的嵌入相似性密切相关。在本文中，我们提出了词对齐对比学习（WACO），这是一种简单有效的方法，用于资源极少的语音到文本翻译。我们的关键思想是通过对比学习来桥接语音和文本模式的词级表示。我们在 MuST-C 数据集（广泛使用的 ST 基准）以及 IWSLT 2023 的低资源方向马耳他语-英语上评估 WACO 和其他方法。我们的实验表明，WACO 仅使用 1 小时并行 ST 数据，就比最佳基线高出 9 个以上的 BLEU 点。代码可在 https://github.com/owaski/WACO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WACO的词对齐对比学习方法，用于解决极低资源条件下的端到端语音翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音翻译方法在极小语料数据下表现不佳，而嵌入相似性是影响模型性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 通过对比学习桥接语音和文本的词级表示，实现跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在MuST-C和IWSLT 2023低资源方向测试中，WACO在仅1小时平行数据下超越最佳基线9+ BLEU点。
AI.conclusion: WACO通过词级对比学习有效提升了极低资源语音翻译性能，验证了跨模态对齐的重要性。

search_text: WACO: Word-Aligned Contrastive Learning for Speech Translation WACO：语音翻译的词对齐对比学习 End-to-end Speech Translation (E2E ST) aims to directly translate source speech into target text. Existing ST methods perform poorly when only extremely small speech-text data are available for training. We observe that an ST model's performance closely correlates with its embedding similarity between speech and source transcript. In this paper, we propose Word-Aligned COntrastive learning (WACO), a simple and effective method for extremely low-resource speech-to-text translation. Our key idea is bridging word-level representations for both speech and text modalities via contrastive learning. We evaluate WACO and other methods on the MuST-C dataset, a widely used ST benchmark, and on a low-resource direction Maltese-English from IWSLT 2023. Our experiments demonstrate that WACO outperforms the best baseline by 9+ BLEU points with only 1-hour parallel ST data. Code is available at https://github.com/owaski/WACO. 端到端语音翻译（E2E ST）旨在将源语音直接翻译为目标文本。当只有极小的语音文本数据可用于训练时，现有的 ST 方法表现不佳。我们观察到 ST 模型的性能与其语音和源转录本之间的嵌入相似性密切相关。在本文中，我们提出了词对齐对比学习（WACO），这是一种简单有效的方法，用于资源极少的语音到文本翻译。我们的关键思想是通过对比学习来桥接语音和文本模式的词级表示。我们在 MuST-C 数据集（广泛使用的 ST 基准）以及 IWSLT 2023 的低资源方向马耳他语-英语上评估 WACO 和其他方法。我们的实验表明，WACO 仅使用 1 小时并行 ST 数据，就比最佳基线高出 9 个以上的 BLEU 点。代码可在 https://github.com/owaski/WACO 获取。 本文提出了一种名为WACO的词对齐对比学习方法，用于解决极低资源条件下的端到端语音翻译问题。 Siqi Ouyang,Rong Ye,Lei Li cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hartmut Surmann,Ivana Kruijff-Korbayova,Kevin Daun,Marius Schnaubelt,Oskar von Stryk,Manuel Patchou,Stefan Boecker,Christian Wietfeld,Jan Quenzel,Daniel Schleich,Sven Behnke,Robert Grafe,Nils Heidemann,Dominik Slomma
title: Lessons from Robot-Assisted Disaster Response Deployments by the German Rescue Robotics Center Task Force
title_zh: 德国救援机器人中心工作组机器人辅助灾难响应部署的经验教训
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, PrePrint, Technical Report, German Rescue Robotic Center
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, PrePrint, Technical Report, German Rescue Robotic Center
abstract: Earthquakes, fire, and floods often cause structural collapses of buildings. The inspection of damaged buildings poses a high risk for emergency forces or is even impossible, though. We present three recent selected missions of the Robotics Task Force of the German Rescue Robotics Center, where both ground and aerial robots were used to explore destroyed buildings. We describe and reflect the missions as well as the lessons learned that have resulted from them. In order to make robots from research laboratories fit for real operations, realistic test environments were set up for outdoor and indoor use and tested in regular exercises by researchers and emergency forces. Based on this experience, the robots and their control software were significantly improved. Furthermore, top teams of researchers and first responders were formed, each with realistic assessments of the operational and practical suitability of robotic systems.
summary: Earthquakes, fire, and floods often cause structural collapses of buildings. The inspection of damaged buildings poses a high risk for emergency forces or is even impossible, though. We present three recent selected missions of the Robotics Task Force of the German Rescue Robotics Center, where both ground and aerial robots were used to explore destroyed buildings. We describe and reflect the missions as well as the lessons learned that have resulted from them. In order to make robots from research laboratories fit for real operations, realistic test environments were set up for outdoor and indoor use and tested in regular exercises by researchers and emergency forces. Based on this experience, the robots and their control software were significantly improved. Furthermore, top teams of researchers and first responders were formed, each with realistic assessments of the operational and practical suitability of robotic systems.
abstract_zh: 地震、火灾和洪水经常导致建筑物的结构倒塌。然而，对受损建筑物进行检查对应急部队来说存在很高的风险，甚至是不可能的。我们介绍了德国救援机器人中心机器人特遣队最近选定的三个任务，其中地面和空中机器人都被用来探索被毁坏的建筑物。我们描述并反映了这些任务以及从中吸取的教训。为了使研究实验室的机器人适合实际操作，建立了适合室外和室内使用的真实测试环境，并由研究人员和应急部队进行定期演习进行测试。基于这一经验，机器人及其控制软件得到了显着改进。此外，还组建了由研究人员和急救人员组成的顶级团队，每个团队都对机器人系统的操作和实际适用性进行了现实评估。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了德国救援机器人中心任务组在三次灾难响应任务中使用地面和空中机器人探索受损建筑的经验教训，并总结了改进机器人系统的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统应急人员进入危险建筑检查存在高风险或不可行，需利用机器人提高救援效率与安全性。
AI.method: 通过建立室内外真实测试环境，定期组织演练，并联合研究人员和应急人员团队进行实战评估，以优化机器人系统。
AI.result: 机器人系统及控制软件性能显著提升，跨学科团队协作效率提高，为实际救援任务提供了更可靠的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 实战部署与真实测试环境结合是提升救援机器人实用性的关键，跨领域协作能有效推动技术落地。

authors_text: Jože M. Rožanec,Patrik Zajec,Spyros Theodoropoulos,Erik Koehorst,Blaž Fortuna,Dunja Mladenić
title: Robust Anomaly Map Assisted Multiple Defect Detection with Supervised Classification Techniques
title_zh: 鲁棒异常图通过监督分类技术辅助多重缺陷检测
abstract: Industry 4.0 aims to optimize the manufacturing environment by leveraging new technological advances, such as new sensing capabilities and artificial intelligence. The DRAEM technique has shown state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised classification. The ability to create anomaly maps highlighting areas where defects probably lie can be leveraged to provide cues to supervised classification models and enhance their performance. Our research shows that the best performance is achieved when training a defect detection model by providing an image and the corresponding anomaly map as input. Furthermore, such a setting provides consistent performance when framing the defect detection as a binary or multiclass classification problem and is not affected by class balancing policies. We performed the experiments on three datasets with real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV.
summary: Industry 4.0 aims to optimize the manufacturing environment by leveraging new technological advances, such as new sensing capabilities and artificial intelligence. The DRAEM technique has shown state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised classification. The ability to create anomaly maps highlighting areas where defects probably lie can be leveraged to provide cues to supervised classification models and enhance their performance. Our research shows that the best performance is achieved when training a defect detection model by providing an image and the corresponding anomaly map as input. Furthermore, such a setting provides consistent performance when framing the defect detection as a binary or multiclass classification problem and is not affected by class balancing policies. We performed the experiments on three datasets with real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV.
abstract_zh: 工业 4.0 旨在通过利用新的技术进步（例如新的传感功能和人工智能）来优化制造环境。 DRAEM 技术在无监督分类方面表现出了最先进的性能。创建异常图来突出显示可能存在缺陷的区域的能力可以为监督分类模型提供线索并提高其性能。我们的研究表明，通过提供图像和相应的异常图作为输入来训练缺陷检测模型时，可以获得最佳性能。此外，当将缺陷检测构建为二元或多类分类问题时，这样的设置提供了一致的性能，并且不受类平衡策略的影响。我们使用 Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV 提供的真实数据在三个数据集上进行了实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合异常图与监督分类技术，实现多缺陷检测的鲁棒方法。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0需提升制造缺陷检测效率，现有无监督方法（如DRAEM）虽有效，但未充分利用异常图辅助监督模型的潜力。
AI.method: 训练缺陷检测模型时，将图像与对应异常图作为输入，通过监督分类技术实现二分类或多分类任务，无需依赖类别平衡策略。
AI.result: 在飞利浦提供的三个真实数据集上，该方法均取得最佳性能，且在分类任务类型和类别平衡策略上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 异常图辅助监督分类能显著提升缺陷检测性能，适用于复杂工业场景的多缺陷识别需求。

authors_text: Archontia C. Giannopoulou,Dimitrios M. Thilikos,Sebastian Wiederrecht
title: Excluding Single-Crossing Matching Minors in Bipartite Graphs
title_zh: 排除二部图中的单交叉匹配未成年人
abstract: \noindent By a seminal result of Valiant, computing the permanent of $(0,1)$-matrices is, in general, $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard. In 1913 Pólya asked for which $(0,1)$-matrices $A$ it is possible to change some signs such that the permanent of $A$ equals the determinant of the resulting matrix. In 1975, Little showed these matrices to be exactly the biadjacency matrices of bipartite graphs excluding $K_{3,3}$ as a \{matching minor}. This was turned into a polynomial time algorithm by McCuaig, Robertson, Seymour, and Thomas in 1999. However, the relation between the exclusion of some matching minor in a bipartite graph and the tractability of the permanent extends beyond $K_{3,3}.$ Recently it was shown that the exclusion of any planar bipartite graph as a matching minor yields a class of bipartite graphs on which the {permanent} of the corresponding $(0,1)$-matrices can be computed efficiently. In this paper we unify the two results above into a single, more general result in the style of the celebrated structure theorem for single-crossing-minor-free graphs. We identify a class of bipartite graphs strictly generalising planar bipartite graphs and $K_{3,3}$ which includes infinitely many non-Pfaffian graphs. The exclusion of any member of this class as a matching minor yields a structure that allows for the efficient evaluation of the permanent. Moreover, we show that the evaluation of the permanent remains $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard on bipartite graphs which exclude $K_{5,5}$ as a matching minor. This establishes a first computational lower bound for the problem of counting perfect matchings on matching minor closed classes.
summary: \noindent By a seminal result of Valiant, computing the permanent of $(0,1)$-matrices is, in general, $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard. In 1913 Pólya asked for which $(0,1)$-matrices $A$ it is possible to change some signs such that the permanent of $A$ equals the determinant of the resulting matrix. In 1975, Little showed these matrices to be exactly the biadjacency matrices of bipartite graphs excluding $K_{3,3}$ as a \{matching minor}. This was turned into a polynomial time algorithm by McCuaig, Robertson, Seymour, and Thomas in 1999. However, the relation between the exclusion of some matching minor in a bipartite graph and the tractability of the permanent extends beyond $K_{3,3}.$ Recently it was shown that the exclusion of any planar bipartite graph as a matching minor yields a class of bipartite graphs on which the {permanent} of the corresponding $(0,1)$-matrices can be computed efficiently. In this paper we unify the two results above into a single, more general result in the style of the celebrated structure theorem for single-crossing-minor-free graphs. We identify a class of bipartite graphs strictly generalising planar bipartite graphs and $K_{3,3}$ which includes infinitely many non-Pfaffian graphs. The exclusion of any member of this class as a matching minor yields a structure that allows for the efficient evaluation of the permanent. Moreover, we show that the evaluation of the permanent remains $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard on bipartite graphs which exclude $K_{5,5}$ as a matching minor. This establishes a first computational lower bound for the problem of counting perfect matchings on matching minor closed classes.
abstract_zh: \noindent 根据 Valiant 的开创性结果，计算 $(0,1)$ 矩阵的永久矩阵通常是 $\#\mathsf{P}$-困难。 1913 年，Pólya 提出对于哪些 $(0,1)$ 矩阵 $A$ 可以改变一些符号，使得 $A$ 的永久矩阵等于结果矩阵的行列式。 1975 年，Little 证明这些矩阵正是二分图的邻接矩阵，不包括 $K_{3,3}$ 作为 \{匹配次要}。 McCuaig、Robertson、Seymour 和 Thomas 在 1999 年将其转化为多项式时间算法。然而，二分图中排除某些匹配次要项与永久项的可处理性之间的关系超出了 $K_{3,3}。$ 最近表明，排除任何平面二分图作为匹配次项会产生一类二分图，在该类二分图上，对应项的 {永久项} $(0,1)$-矩阵可以有效地计算。在本文中，我们将上述两个结果统一为一个更通用的结果，采用著名的单交叉次要无图结构定理的风格。我们确定了一类严格概括平面二分图和 $K_{3,3}$ 的二分图，其中包括无限多个非普法夫图。将此类中的任何成员排除为匹配的未成年人会产生一种允许对永久物进行有效评估的结构。此外，我们还表明，在排除 $K_{5,5}$ 作为匹配次要的二部图上，永久的评估仍然是 $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard。这为匹配次要封闭类的完美匹配计数问题建立了第一个计算下界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究二部图中排除"单交叉匹配子式"对永久式计算复杂度的影响，并建立统一的结构定理。
AI.motivation: 为了统一Little关于排除K_{3,3}匹配子式与永久式可计算性的结果，以及近期关于排除任何平面二部图匹配子式可高效计算永久式的结果，并探索更一般的匹配子式闭类中永久式的计算复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过识别一类严格推广平面二部图和K_{3,3}的图类（包含无限多个非Pfaffian图），利用结构定理分析排除该类匹配子式后的图结构，进而设计高效计算永久式的算法，并构造K_{5,5}匹配子式排除类中的#P-hard归约。
AI.result: 证明了排除该类中任何成员作为匹配子式的二部图具有可高效计算永久式的结构；同时证明排除K_{5,5}作为匹配子式的二部图上计算永久式仍是#P-hard的。
AI.conclusion: 建立了匹配子式闭类中计算完美匹配计数问题的首个计算下界，统一并推广了已有结果，揭示了单交叉匹配子式排除与永久式可计算性之间的深层联系。

search_text: Excluding Single-Crossing Matching Minors in Bipartite Graphs 排除二部图中的单交叉匹配未成年人 \noindent By a seminal result of Valiant, computing the permanent of $(0,1)$-matrices is, in general, $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard. In 1913 Pólya asked for which $(0,1)$-matrices $A$ it is possible to change some signs such that the permanent of $A$ equals the determinant of the resulting matrix. In 1975, Little showed these matrices to be exactly the biadjacency matrices of bipartite graphs excluding $K_{3,3}$ as a \{matching minor}. This was turned into a polynomial time algorithm by McCuaig, Robertson, Seymour, and Thomas in 1999. However, the relation between the exclusion of some matching minor in a bipartite graph and the tractability of the permanent extends beyond $K_{3,3}.$ Recently it was shown that the exclusion of any planar bipartite graph as a matching minor yields a class of bipartite graphs on which the {permanent} of the corresponding $(0,1)$-matrices can be computed efficiently. In this paper we unify the two results above into a single, more general result in the style of the celebrated structure theorem for single-crossing-minor-free graphs. We identify a class of bipartite graphs strictly generalising planar bipartite graphs and $K_{3,3}$ which includes infinitely many non-Pfaffian graphs. The exclusion of any member of this class as a matching minor yields a structure that allows for the efficient evaluation of the permanent. Moreover, we show that the evaluation of the permanent remains $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard on bipartite graphs which exclude $K_{5,5}$ as a matching minor. This establishes a first computational lower bound for the problem of counting perfect matchings on matching minor closed classes. \noindent 根据 Valiant 的开创性结果，计算 $(0,1)$ 矩阵的永久矩阵通常是 $\#\mathsf{P}$-困难。 1913 年，Pólya 提出对于哪些 $(0,1)$ 矩阵 $A$ 可以改变一些符号，使得 $A$ 的永久矩阵等于结果矩阵的行列式。 1975 年，Little 证明这些矩阵正是二分图的邻接矩阵，不包括 $K_{3,3}$ 作为 \{匹配次要}。 McCuaig、Robertson、Seymour 和 Thomas 在 1999 年将其转化为多项式时间算法。然而，二分图中排除某些匹配次要项与永久项的可处理性之间的关系超出了 $K_{3,3}。$ 最近表明，排除任何平面二分图作为匹配次项会产生一类二分图，在该类二分图上，对应项的 {永久项} $(0,1)$-矩阵可以有效地计算。在本文中，我们将上述两个结果统一为一个更通用的结果，采用著名的单交叉次要无图结构定理的风格。我们确定了一类严格概括平面二分图和 $K_{3,3}$ 的二分图，其中包括无限多个非普法夫图。将此类中的任何成员排除为匹配的未成年人会产生一种允许对永久物进行有效评估的结构。此外，我们还表明，在排除 $K_{5,5}$ 作为匹配次要的二部图上，永久的评估仍然是 $\#\mathsf{P}$-hard。这为匹配次要封闭类的完美匹配计数问题建立了第一个计算下界。 本文研究二部图中排除"单交叉匹配子式"对永久式计算复杂度的影响，并建立统一的结构定理。 Archontia C. Giannopoulou,Dimitrios M. Thilikos,Sebastian Wiederrecht math.CO,cs.DS

authors_text: Minhui Zou,Nan Du,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: Review of security techniques for memristor computing systems
title_zh: 忆阻器计算系统安全技术综述
abstract: Neural network (NN) algorithms have become the dominant tool in visual object recognition, natural language processing, and robotics. To enhance the computational efficiency of these algorithms, in comparison to the traditional von Neuman computing architectures, researchers have been focusing on memristor computing systems. A major drawback when using memristor computing systems today is that, in the artificial intelligence (AI) era, well-trained NN models are intellectual property and, when loaded in the memristor computing systems, face theft threats, especially when running in edge devices. An adversary may steal the well-trained NN models through advanced attacks such as learning attacks and side-channel analysis. In this paper, we review different security techniques for protecting memristor computing systems. Two threat models are described based on their assumptions regarding the adversary's capabilities: a black-box (BB) model and a white-box (WB) model. We categorize the existing security techniques into five classes in the context of these threat models: thwarting learning attacks (BB), thwarting side-channel attacks (BB), NN model encryption (WB), NN weight transformation (WB), and fingerprint embedding (WB). We also present a cross-comparison of the limitations of the security techniques. This paper could serve as an aid when designing secure memristor computing systems.
summary: Neural network (NN) algorithms have become the dominant tool in visual object recognition, natural language processing, and robotics. To enhance the computational efficiency of these algorithms, in comparison to the traditional von Neuman computing architectures, researchers have been focusing on memristor computing systems. A major drawback when using memristor computing systems today is that, in the artificial intelligence (AI) era, well-trained NN models are intellectual property and, when loaded in the memristor computing systems, face theft threats, especially when running in edge devices. An adversary may steal the well-trained NN models through advanced attacks such as learning attacks and side-channel analysis. In this paper, we review different security techniques for protecting memristor computing systems. Two threat models are described based on their assumptions regarding the adversary's capabilities: a black-box (BB) model and a white-box (WB) model. We categorize the existing security techniques into five classes in the context of these threat models: thwarting learning attacks (BB), thwarting side-channel attacks (BB), NN model encryption (WB), NN weight transformation (WB), and fingerprint embedding (WB). We also present a cross-comparison of the limitations of the security techniques. This paper could serve as an aid when designing secure memristor computing systems.
abstract_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 算法已成为视觉对象识别、自然语言处理和机器人技术的主要工具。为了提高这些算法的计算效率，与传统的冯诺依曼计算架构相比，研究人员一直关注忆阻器计算系统。如今使用忆阻器计算系统的一个主要缺点是，在人工智能 (AI) 时代，训练有素的神经网络模型属于知识产权，当加载到忆阻器计算系统中时，会面临盗窃威胁，尤其是在边缘设备中运行时。对手可能会通过学习攻击和旁道分析等高级攻击窃取训练有素的神经网络模型。在本文中，我们回顾了用于保护忆阻器计算系统的不同安全技术。基于对对手能力的假设描述了两种威胁模型：黑盒（BB）模型和白盒（WB）模型。根据这些威胁模型，我们将现有的安全技术分为五类：阻止学习攻击（BB）、阻止侧信道攻击（BB）、神经网络模型加密（WB）、神经网络权重变换（WB）和指纹嵌入（WB）。我们还对安全技术的局限性进行了交叉比较。本文可以为设计安全忆阻器计算系统提供帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于保护忆阻器计算系统的安全技术，针对模型窃取攻击提出分类与对比分析。
AI.motivation: 在人工智能时代，训练好的神经网络模型作为核心知识产权，面临在边缘设备中通过学习攻击和侧信道分析被盗取的风险。
AI.method: 基于黑盒与白盒威胁模型，将现有安全技术分为五类并进行跨技术对比，分析其局限性。
AI.result: 系统梳理了五类安全技术（抗学习攻击、抗侧信道攻击、模型加密、权重转换、指纹嵌入）的适用场景与技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为设计安全的忆阻器计算系统提供了技术路线参考，强调需根据威胁模型选择适配的安全方案。

authors_text: Courtney Ford,Mark T Keane
title: Explaining Classifications to Non Experts: An XAI User Study of Post Hoc Explanations for a Classifier When People Lack Expertise
title_zh: 向非专家解释分类：当人们缺乏专业知识时分类器事后解释的 XAI 用户研究
abstract: Very few eXplainable AI (XAI) studies consider how users understanding of explanations might change depending on whether they know more or less about the to be explained domain (i.e., whether they differ in their expertise). Yet, expertise is a critical facet of most high stakes, human decision making (e.g., understanding how a trainee doctor differs from an experienced consultant). Accordingly, this paper reports a novel, user study (N=96) on how peoples expertise in a domain affects their understanding of post-hoc explanations by example for a deep-learning, black box classifier. The results show that peoples understanding of explanations for correct and incorrect classifications changes dramatically, on several dimensions (e.g., response times, perceptions of correctness and helpfulness), when the image-based domain considered is familiar (i.e., MNIST) as opposed to unfamiliar (i.e., Kannada MNIST). The wider implications of these new findings for XAI strategies are discussed.
summary: Very few eXplainable AI (XAI) studies consider how users understanding of explanations might change depending on whether they know more or less about the to be explained domain (i.e., whether they differ in their expertise). Yet, expertise is a critical facet of most high stakes, human decision making (e.g., understanding how a trainee doctor differs from an experienced consultant). Accordingly, this paper reports a novel, user study (N=96) on how peoples expertise in a domain affects their understanding of post-hoc explanations by example for a deep-learning, black box classifier. The results show that peoples understanding of explanations for correct and incorrect classifications changes dramatically, on several dimensions (e.g., response times, perceptions of correctness and helpfulness), when the image-based domain considered is familiar (i.e., MNIST) as opposed to unfamiliar (i.e., Kannada MNIST). The wider implications of these new findings for XAI strategies are discussed.
abstract_zh: 很少有 eXplainable AI (XAI) 研究考虑用户对解释的理解可能会如何变化，具体取决于他们对要解释的领域了解更多还是更少（即，他们的专业知识是否不同）。然而，专业知识是大多数高风险人类决策的一个关键方面（例如，了解实习医生与经验丰富的顾问有何不同）。因此，本文报告了一项新颖的用户研究（N = 96），以深度学习黑盒分类器为例，研究人们在某个领域的专业知识如何影响他们对事后解释的理解。结果表明，当所考虑的基于图像的领域是熟悉的（即 MNIST）而不是不熟悉的（即卡纳达 MNIST）时，人们对正确和错误分类的解释的理解在多个维度（例如，响应时间、对正确性和有用性的看法）上发生巨大变化。讨论了这些新发现对 XAI 策略的更广泛影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究不同领域专业知识水平的用户对可解释人工智能（XAI）后验解释的理解差异，特别是正确与错误分类情况下的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI研究较少关注用户专业知识水平对解释理解的影响，而专业知识在高风险决策中至关重要（如医疗领域新手与专家的差异）。
AI.method: 通过用户实验（N=96），对比用户在熟悉领域（MNIST）与不熟悉领域（Kannada MNIST）下对图像分类器后验解释的理解表现，分析反应时间、正确性感知和帮助性等维度。
AI.result: 用户对正确和错误分类的解释理解在熟悉与不熟悉领域间存在显著差异，表现为反应时间、正确性判断及解释有用性感知的明显变化。
AI.conclusion: 用户专业知识水平显著影响其对XAI解释的理解效果，提示未来XAI策略需根据用户专业背景调整解释设计，以提升解释的有效性和适用性。

search_text: Explaining Classifications to Non Experts: An XAI User Study of Post Hoc Explanations for a Classifier When People Lack Expertise 向非专家解释分类：当人们缺乏专业知识时分类器事后解释的 XAI 用户研究 Very few eXplainable AI (XAI) studies consider how users understanding of explanations might change depending on whether they know more or less about the to be explained domain (i.e., whether they differ in their expertise). Yet, expertise is a critical facet of most high stakes, human decision making (e.g., understanding how a trainee doctor differs from an experienced consultant). Accordingly, this paper reports a novel, user study (N=96) on how peoples expertise in a domain affects their understanding of post-hoc explanations by example for a deep-learning, black box classifier. The results show that peoples understanding of explanations for correct and incorrect classifications changes dramatically, on several dimensions (e.g., response times, perceptions of correctness and helpfulness), when the image-based domain considered is familiar (i.e., MNIST) as opposed to unfamiliar (i.e., Kannada MNIST). The wider implications of these new findings for XAI strategies are discussed. 很少有 eXplainable AI (XAI) 研究考虑用户对解释的理解可能会如何变化，具体取决于他们对要解释的领域了解更多还是更少（即，他们的专业知识是否不同）。然而，专业知识是大多数高风险人类决策的一个关键方面（例如，了解实习医生与经验丰富的顾问有何不同）。因此，本文报告了一项新颖的用户研究（N = 96），以深度学习黑盒分类器为例，研究人们在某个领域的专业知识如何影响他们对事后解释的理解。结果表明，当所考虑的基于图像的领域是熟悉的（即 MNIST）而不是不熟悉的（即卡纳达 MNIST）时，人们对正确和错误分类的解释的理解在多个维度（例如，响应时间、对正确性和有用性的看法）上发生巨大变化。讨论了这些新发现对 XAI 策略的更广泛影响。 本论文研究不同领域专业知识水平的用户对可解释人工智能（XAI）后验解释的理解差异，特别是正确与错误分类情况下的表现差异。 Courtney Ford,Mark T Keane cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Chen Ju,Kunhao Zheng,Jinxiang Liu,Peisen Zhao,Ya Zhang,Jianlong Chang,Yanfeng Wang,Qi Tian
title: Distilling Vision-Language Pre-training to Collaborate with Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 提炼视觉语言预训练以与弱监督时间动作本地化协作
comment: The first two authors share the same contribution
comments: The first two authors share the same contribution
abstract: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization (WTAL) learns to detect and classify action instances with only category labels. Most methods widely adopt the off-the-shelf Classification-Based Pre-training (CBP) to generate video features for action localization. However, the different optimization objectives between classification and localization, make temporally localized results suffer from the serious incomplete issue. To tackle this issue without additional annotations, this paper considers to distill free action knowledge from Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP), since we surprisingly observe that the localization results of vanilla VLP have an over-complete issue, which is just complementary to the CBP results. To fuse such complementarity, we propose a novel distillation-collaboration framework with two branches acting as CBP and VLP respectively. The framework is optimized through a dual-branch alternate training strategy. Specifically, during the B step, we distill the confident background pseudo-labels from the CBP branch; while during the F step, the confident foreground pseudo-labels are distilled from the VLP branch. And as a result, the dual-branch complementarity is effectively fused to promote a strong alliance. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.2 reveal that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization (WTAL) learns to detect and classify action instances with only category labels. Most methods widely adopt the off-the-shelf Classification-Based Pre-training (CBP) to generate video features for action localization. However, the different optimization objectives between classification and localization, make temporally localized results suffer from the serious incomplete issue. To tackle this issue without additional annotations, this paper considers to distill free action knowledge from Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP), since we surprisingly observe that the localization results of vanilla VLP have an over-complete issue, which is just complementary to the CBP results. To fuse such complementarity, we propose a novel distillation-collaboration framework with two branches acting as CBP and VLP respectively. The framework is optimized through a dual-branch alternate training strategy. Specifically, during the B step, we distill the confident background pseudo-labels from the CBP branch; while during the F step, the confident foreground pseudo-labels are distilled from the VLP branch. And as a result, the dual-branch complementarity is effectively fused to promote a strong alliance. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.2 reveal that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位（WTAL）学习仅使用类别标签来检测和分类动作实例。大多数方法广泛采用现成的基于分类的预训练（CBP）来生成用于动作定位的视频特征。然而，分类和定位之间不同的优化目标，使得时间定位结果存在严重的不完整问题。为了在没有额外注释的情况下解决这个问题，本文考虑从视觉语言预训练（VLP）中提取自由动作知识，因为我们令人惊讶地观察到普通 VLP 的定位结果存在过度完整的问题，这只是对 CBP 结果的补充。为了融合这种互补性，我们提出了一种新颖的蒸馏协作框架，其中两个分支分别充当 CBP 和 VLP。该框架通过双分支交替训练策略进行优化。具体来说，在B步骤中，我们从CBP分支中提取置信背景伪标签；而在 F 步骤期间，从 VLP 分支中提取置信的前景伪标签。从而有效融合双支互补，促进强强联合。对 THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet1.2 的大量实验和消融研究表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过蒸馏视觉-语言预训练模型知识来改进弱监督时序动作定位的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖分类预训练模型生成视频特征，但分类与定位目标差异导致定位结果不完整；而视觉-语言预训练模型存在过度完整问题，两者互补性可被利用。
AI.method: 设计双分支框架（CBP分支与VLP分支），通过交替训练策略：B步从CBP分支蒸馏背景伪标签，F步从VLP分支蒸馏前景伪标签，融合互补性提升定位效果。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet1.2数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过蒸馏协作框架有效结合CBP与VLP的互补特性，为弱监督时序动作定位提供了新思路。

And as a result, the dual-branch complementarity is effectively fused to promote a strong alliance. authors_text: Rahul Goel,Sirikonda Dhawal,Saurabh Saini,P. J. Narayanan
title: StyleTRF: Stylizing Tensorial Radiance Fields
title_zh: StyleTRF：风格化张量辐射场
abstract: Stylized view generation of scenes captured casually using a camera has received much attention recently. The geometry and appearance of the scene are typically captured as neural point sets or neural radiance fields in the previous work. An image stylization method is used to stylize the captured appearance by training its network jointly or iteratively with the structure capture network. The state-of-the-art SNeRF method trains the NeRF and stylization network in an alternating manner. These methods have high training time and require joint optimization. In this work, we present StyleTRF, a compact, quick-to-optimize strategy for stylized view generation using TensoRF. The appearance part is fine-tuned using sparse stylized priors of a few views rendered using the TensoRF representation for a few iterations. Our method thus effectively decouples style-adaption from view capture and is much faster than the previous methods. We show state-of-the-art results on several scenes used for this purpose.
summary: Stylized view generation of scenes captured casually using a camera has received much attention recently. The geometry and appearance of the scene are typically captured as neural point sets or neural radiance fields in the previous work. An image stylization method is used to stylize the captured appearance by training its network jointly or iteratively with the structure capture network. The state-of-the-art SNeRF method trains the NeRF and stylization network in an alternating manner. These methods have high training time and require joint optimization. In this work, we present StyleTRF, a compact, quick-to-optimize strategy for stylized view generation using TensoRF. The appearance part is fine-tuned using sparse stylized priors of a few views rendered using the TensoRF representation for a few iterations. Our method thus effectively decouples style-adaption from view capture and is much faster than the previous methods. We show state-of-the-art results on several scenes used for this purpose.
abstract_zh: 使用相机随意拍摄的场景的风格化视图生成最近受到了广泛关注。在之前的工作中，场景的几何形状和外观通常被捕获为神经点集或神经辐射场。图像风格化方法用于通过与结构捕获网络联合或迭代地训练其网络来风格化捕获的外观。最先进的 SNeRF 方法以交替方式训练 NeRF 和风格化网络。这些方法训练时间长，需要联合优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 StyleTRF，一种紧凑、快速优化的策略，用于使用 TensoRF 生成风格化视图。外观部分使用稀疏风格化先验进行微调，这些视图是使用 TensoRF 表示进行几次迭代渲染的。因此，我们的方法有效地将样式适应与视图捕获分离，并且比以前的方法快得多。我们展示了用于此目的的几个场景的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleTRF方法，利用TensoRF实现快速高效的场景风格化视图生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如SNeRF通过交替训练NeRF和风格化网络，存在训练时间长且需联合优化的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于TensoRF表示，通过稀疏风格化先验对少量视图进行几次迭代优化，将风格适应与视图捕获解耦，实现快速优化。
AI.result: 在多个场景中取得最先进的风格化视图生成效果，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: StyleTRF提供了一种紧凑且高效的风格化视图生成策略，在速度和效果上均优于现有技术。

ai_content.motivation: 现有方法如SNeRF通过交替训练NeRF和风格化网络，存在训练时间长且需联合优化的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。

search_text: StyleTRF: Stylizing Tensorial Radiance Fields StyleTRF：风格化张量辐射场 Stylized view generation of scenes captured casually using a camera has received much attention recently. The geometry and appearance of the scene are typically captured as neural point sets or neural radiance fields in the previous work. An image stylization method is used to stylize the captured appearance by training its network jointly or iteratively with the structure capture network. The state-of-the-art SNeRF method trains the NeRF and stylization network in an alternating manner. These methods have high training time and require joint optimization. In this work, we present StyleTRF, a compact, quick-to-optimize strategy for stylized view generation using TensoRF. The appearance part is fine-tuned using sparse stylized priors of a few views rendered using the TensoRF representation for a few iterations. Our method thus effectively decouples style-adaption from view capture and is much faster than the previous methods. We show state-of-the-art results on several scenes used for this purpose. 使用相机随意拍摄的场景的风格化视图生成最近受到了广泛关注。在之前的工作中，场景的几何形状和外观通常被捕获为神经点集或神经辐射场。图像风格化方法用于通过与结构捕获网络联合或迭代地训练其网络来风格化捕获的外观。最先进的 SNeRF 方法以交替方式训练 NeRF 和风格化网络。这些方法训练时间长，需要联合优化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 StyleTRF，一种紧凑、快速优化的策略，用于使用 TensoRF 生成风格化视图。外观部分使用稀疏风格化先验进行微调，这些视图是使用 TensoRF 表示进行几次迭代渲染的。因此，我们的方法有效地将样式适应与视图捕获分离，并且比以前的方法快得多。我们展示了用于此目的的几个场景的最先进的结果。 本文提出StyleTRF方法，利用TensoRF实现快速高效的场景风格化视图生成。 Rahul Goel,Sirikonda Dhawal,Saurabh Saini,P. J. Narayanan cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxiang Zhang,Zhenbo Liu,Shuai Wang
title: SrTR: Self-reasoning Transformer with Visual-linguistic Knowledge for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: SrTR：具有视觉语言知识的自推理变压器，用于场景图生成
abstract: Objects in a scene are not always related. The execution efficiency of the one-stage scene graph generation approaches are quite high, which infer the effective relation between entity pairs using sparse proposal sets and a few queries. However, they only focus on the relation between subject and object in triplet set subject entity, predicate entity, object entity, ignoring the relation between subject and predicate or predicate and object, and the model lacks self-reasoning ability. In addition, linguistic modality has been neglected in the one-stage method. It is necessary to mine linguistic modality knowledge to improve model reasoning ability. To address the above-mentioned shortcomings, a Self-reasoning Transformer with Visual-linguistic Knowledge (SrTR) is proposed to add flexible self-reasoning ability to the model. An encoder-decoder architecture is adopted in SrTR, and a self-reasoning decoder is developed to complete three inferences of the triplet set, s+o-p, s+p-o and p+o-s. Inspired by the large-scale pre-training image-text foundation models, visual-linguistic prior knowledge is introduced and a visual-linguistic alignment strategy is designed to project visual representations into semantic spaces with prior knowledge to aid relational reasoning. Experiments on the Visual Genome dataset demonstrate the superiority and fast inference ability of the proposed method.
summary: Objects in a scene are not always related. The execution efficiency of the one-stage scene graph generation approaches are quite high, which infer the effective relation between entity pairs using sparse proposal sets and a few queries. However, they only focus on the relation between subject and object in triplet set subject entity, predicate entity, object entity, ignoring the relation between subject and predicate or predicate and object, and the model lacks self-reasoning ability. In addition, linguistic modality has been neglected in the one-stage method. It is necessary to mine linguistic modality knowledge to improve model reasoning ability. To address the above-mentioned shortcomings, a Self-reasoning Transformer with Visual-linguistic Knowledge (SrTR) is proposed to add flexible self-reasoning ability to the model. An encoder-decoder architecture is adopted in SrTR, and a self-reasoning decoder is developed to complete three inferences of the triplet set, s+o-p, s+p-o and p+o-s. Inspired by the large-scale pre-training image-text foundation models, visual-linguistic prior knowledge is introduced and a visual-linguistic alignment strategy is designed to project visual representations into semantic spaces with prior knowledge to aid relational reasoning. Experiments on the Visual Genome dataset demonstrate the superiority and fast inference ability of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 场景中的对象并不总是相关的。一阶段场景图生成方法的执行效率非常高，可以使用稀疏提议集和少量查询来推断实体对之间的有效关系。然而，他们只关注主语实体、谓语实体、宾语实体三元组中主语与宾语的关系，忽略了主语与谓语或谓语与宾语的关系，模型缺乏自推理能力。此外，一阶段法忽略了语言情态。需要挖掘语言情态知识来提高模型推理能力。为了解决上述缺点，提出了一种具有视觉语言知识的自推理变压器（SrTR），为模型添加灵活的自推理能力。 SrTR采用编码器-解码器架构，并开发了自推理解码器来完成三元组集合s+o-p、s+p-o和p+o-s的三个推理。受大规模预训练图像文本基础模型的启发，引入了视觉语言先验知识，并设计了视觉语言对齐策略，将视觉表示投影到具有先验知识的语义空间中以辅助关系推理。在视觉基因组数据集上的实验证明了该方法的优越性和快速推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SrTR模型，通过结合视觉-语言知识提升场景图生成中的自推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段方法忽视了主语-谓语、谓语-宾语关系及语言模态知识，导致模型推理能力不足。
AI.method: 采用编解码架构，设计自推理解码器完成三类三元组推理，并引入视觉-语言对齐策略增强语义关联。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome数据集上验证了方法的优越性和高效推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉-语言先验知识的自推理机制能有效提升场景图生成性能。

authors_text: Sofiene Jerbi,Arjan Cornelissen,Māris Ozols,Vedran Dunjko
title: Quantum policy gradient algorithms
title_zh: 量子策略梯度算法
abstract: Understanding the power and limitations of quantum access to data in machine learning tasks is primordial to assess the potential of quantum computing in artificial intelligence. Previous works have already shown that speed-ups in learning are possible when given quantum access to reinforcement learning environments. Yet, the applicability of quantum algorithms in this setting remains very limited, notably in environments with large state and action spaces. In this work, we design quantum algorithms to train state-of-the-art reinforcement learning policies by exploiting quantum interactions with an environment. However, these algorithms only offer full quadratic speed-ups in sample complexity over their classical analogs when the trained policies satisfy some regularity conditions. Interestingly, we find that reinforcement learning policies derived from parametrized quantum circuits are well-behaved with respect to these conditions, which showcases the benefit of a fully-quantum reinforcement learning framework.
summary: Understanding the power and limitations of quantum access to data in machine learning tasks is primordial to assess the potential of quantum computing in artificial intelligence. Previous works have already shown that speed-ups in learning are possible when given quantum access to reinforcement learning environments. Yet, the applicability of quantum algorithms in this setting remains very limited, notably in environments with large state and action spaces. In this work, we design quantum algorithms to train state-of-the-art reinforcement learning policies by exploiting quantum interactions with an environment. However, these algorithms only offer full quadratic speed-ups in sample complexity over their classical analogs when the trained policies satisfy some regularity conditions. Interestingly, we find that reinforcement learning policies derived from parametrized quantum circuits are well-behaved with respect to these conditions, which showcases the benefit of a fully-quantum reinforcement learning framework.
abstract_zh: 了解机器学习任务中量子数据访问的能力和局限性是评估量子计算在人工智能中的潜力的首要条件。之前的工作已经表明，当给予强化学习环境的量子访问时，学习速度是可能加快的。然而，量子算法在这种情况下的适用性仍然非常有限，特别是在具有较大状态和动作空间的环境中。在这项工作中，我们设计了量子算法，通过利用与环境的量子相互作用来训练最先进的强化学习策略。然而，当训练的策略满足某些规律性条件时，这些算法仅在样本复杂性方面比其经典算法提供完全二次加速。有趣的是，我们发现源自参数化量子电路的强化学习策略在这些条件下表现良好，这展示了全量子强化学习框架的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文设计量子策略梯度算法，通过量子与环境的交互训练强化学习策略，但加速效果依赖于策略的正则性条件。
AI.motivation: 评估量子计算在AI中的潜力，尤其在强化学习中量子数据访问的加速效果，但现有算法在大规模状态动作空间中应用受限。
AI.method: 开发量子算法训练先进强化学习策略，利用量子环境交互，并基于参数化量子电路设计策略。
AI.result: 当策略满足正则条件时，样本复杂度实现二次加速，参数化量子电路策略符合这些条件，验证全量子框架优势。
AI.conclusion: 量子算法在满足特定条件时可显著加速强化学习，参数化量子电路策略为全量子框架提供了可行性验证。

authors_text: Qingrui Jia,Xuhong Li,Lei Yu,Jiang Bian,Penghao Zhao,Shupeng Li,Haoyi Xiong,Dejing Dou
title: Learning from Training Dynamics: Identifying Mislabeled Data Beyond Manually Designed Features
title_zh: 从训练动态中学习：识别手动设计特征之外的错误标记数据
abstract: While mislabeled or ambiguously-labeled samples in the training set could negatively affect the performance of deep models, diagnosing the dataset and identifying mislabeled samples helps to improve the generalization power. Training dynamics, i.e., the traces left by iterations of optimization algorithms, have recently been proved to be effective to localize mislabeled samples with hand-crafted features. In this paper, beyond manually designed features, we introduce a novel learning-based solution, leveraging a noise detector, instanced by an LSTM network, which learns to predict whether a sample was mislabeled using the raw training dynamics as input. Specifically, the proposed method trains the noise detector in a supervised manner using the dataset with synthesized label noises and can adapt to various datasets (either naturally or synthesized label-noised) without retraining. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method. We train the noise detector based on the synthesized label-noised CIFAR dataset and test such noise detector on Tiny ImageNet, CUB-200, Caltech-256, WebVision and Clothing1M. Results show that the proposed method precisely detects mislabeled samples on various datasets without further adaptation, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Besides, more experiments demonstrate that the mislabel identification can guide a label correction, namely data debugging, providing orthogonal improvements of algorithm-centric state-of-the-art techniques from the data aspect.
summary: While mislabeled or ambiguously-labeled samples in the training set could negatively affect the performance of deep models, diagnosing the dataset and identifying mislabeled samples helps to improve the generalization power. Training dynamics, i.e., the traces left by iterations of optimization algorithms, have recently been proved to be effective to localize mislabeled samples with hand-crafted features. In this paper, beyond manually designed features, we introduce a novel learning-based solution, leveraging a noise detector, instanced by an LSTM network, which learns to predict whether a sample was mislabeled using the raw training dynamics as input. Specifically, the proposed method trains the noise detector in a supervised manner using the dataset with synthesized label noises and can adapt to various datasets (either naturally or synthesized label-noised) without retraining. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method. We train the noise detector based on the synthesized label-noised CIFAR dataset and test such noise detector on Tiny ImageNet, CUB-200, Caltech-256, WebVision and Clothing1M. Results show that the proposed method precisely detects mislabeled samples on various datasets without further adaptation, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Besides, more experiments demonstrate that the mislabel identification can guide a label correction, namely data debugging, providing orthogonal improvements of algorithm-centric state-of-the-art techniques from the data aspect.
abstract_zh: 虽然训练集中错误标记或模糊标记的样本可能会对深度模型的性能产生负面影响，但诊断数据集并识别错误标记的样本有助于提高泛化能力。训练动态，即优化算法迭代留下的痕迹，最近被证明可以有效地利用手工制作的特征来定位错误标记的样本。在本文中，除了手动设计的功能之外，我们还引入了一种新颖的基于学习的解决方案，利用噪声检测器（以 LSTM 网络为例），该解决方案使用原始训练动态作为输入来学习预测样本是否被错误标记。具体来说，所提出的方法使用具有合成标签噪声的数据集以监督方式训练噪声检测器，并且可以适应各种数据集（自然数据集或合成标签噪声数据集）而无需重新训练。 We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method.我们基于合成的标签噪声 CIFAR 数据集训练噪声检测器，并在 Tiny ImageNet、CUB-200、Caltech-256、WebVision 和 Clothing1M 上测试此类噪声检测器。结果表明，所提出的方法无需进一步调整即可精确检测各种数据集上错误标记的样本，并且优于最先进的方法。此外，更多的实验表明，错误标签识别可以指导标签校正，即数据调试，从数据方面提供以算法为中心的最先进技术的正交改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于训练动态的新型学习方法，利用LSTM网络检测训练数据中的误标签样本，无需手动设计特征。
AI.motivation: 误标签样本会损害深度模型性能，现有方法依赖手工设计特征分析训练动态，缺乏通用性和适应性。
AI.method: 构建LSTM网络作为噪声检测器，以原始训练动态为输入，通过合成标签噪声数据监督训练，实现跨数据集的误标签检测。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、Tiny ImageNet等多数据集实验中，该方法无需进一步适配即可精准检测误标签，优于现有最先进方法，并通过数据调试提升算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习训练动态特征有效识别误标签，为数据层面的模型优化提供了与算法改进相独立的新途径。

search_text: Learning from Training Dynamics: Identifying Mislabeled Data Beyond Manually Designed Features 从训练动态中学习：识别手动设计特征之外的错误标记数据 While mislabeled or ambiguously-labeled samples in the training set could negatively affect the performance of deep models, diagnosing the dataset and identifying mislabeled samples helps to improve the generalization power. Training dynamics, i.e., the traces left by iterations of optimization algorithms, have recently been proved to be effective to localize mislabeled samples with hand-crafted features. In this paper, beyond manually designed features, we introduce a novel learning-based solution, leveraging a noise detector, instanced by an LSTM network, which learns to predict whether a sample was mislabeled using the raw training dynamics as input. Specifically, the proposed method trains the noise detector in a supervised manner using the dataset with synthesized label noises and can adapt to various datasets (either naturally or synthesized label-noised) without retraining. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method. We train the noise detector based on the synthesized label-noised CIFAR dataset and test such noise detector on Tiny ImageNet, CUB-200, Caltech-256, WebVision and Clothing1M. Results show that the proposed method precisely detects mislabeled samples on various datasets without further adaptation, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Besides, more experiments demonstrate that the mislabel identification can guide a label correction, namely data debugging, providing orthogonal improvements of algorithm-centric state-of-the-art techniques from the data aspect. 虽然训练集中错误标记或模糊标记的样本可能会对深度模型的性能产生负面影响，但诊断数据集并识别错误标记的样本有助于提高泛化能力。训练动态，即优化算法迭代留下的痕迹，最近被证明可以有效地利用手工制作的特征来定位错误标记的样本。在本文中，除了手动设计的功能之外，我们还引入了一种新颖的基于学习的解决方案，利用噪声检测器（以 LSTM 网络为例），该解决方案使用原始训练动态作为输入来学习预测样本是否被错误标记。具体来说，所提出的方法使用具有合成标签噪声的数据集以监督方式训练噪声检测器，并且可以适应各种数据集（自然数据集或合成标签噪声数据集）而无需重新训练。 We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method.我们基于合成的标签噪声 CIFAR 数据集训练噪声检测器，并在 Tiny ImageNet、CUB-200、Caltech-256、WebVision 和 Clothing1M 上测试此类噪声检测器。结果表明，所提出的方法无需进一步调整即可精确检测各种数据集上错误标记的样本，并且优于最先进的方法。此外，更多的实验表明，错误标签识别可以指导标签校正，即数据调试，从数据方面提供以算法为中心的最先进技术的正交改进。 本文提出一种基于训练动态的新型学习方法，利用LSTM网络检测训练数据中的误标签样本，无需手动设计特征。 Qingrui Jia,Xuhong Li,Lei Yu,Jiang Bian,Penghao Zhao,Shupeng Li,Haoyi Xiong,Dejing Dou cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jože M. Rožanec,Patrik Zajec,Spyros Theodoropoulos,Erik Koehorst,Blaž Fortuna,Dunja Mladenić
title: Synthetic Data Augmentation Using GAN For Improved Automated Visual Inspection
title_zh: 使用 GAN 进行合成数据增强以改进自动视觉检查
abstract: Quality control is a crucial activity performed by manufacturing companies to ensure their products conform to the requirements and specifications. The introduction of artificial intelligence models enables to automate the visual quality inspection, speeding up the inspection process and ensuring all products are evaluated under the same criteria. In this research, we compare supervised and unsupervised defect detection techniques and explore data augmentation techniques to mitigate the data imbalance in the context of automated visual inspection. Furthermore, we use Generative Adversarial Networks for data augmentation to enhance the classifiers' discriminative performance. Our results show that state-of-the-art unsupervised defect detection does not match the performance of supervised models but can be used to reduce the labeling workload by more than 50%. Furthermore, the best classification performance was achieved considering GAN-based data generation with AUC ROC scores equal to or higher than 0,9898, even when increasing the dataset imbalance by leaving only 25\% of the images denoting defective products. We performed the research with real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV.
summary: Quality control is a crucial activity performed by manufacturing companies to ensure their products conform to the requirements and specifications. The introduction of artificial intelligence models enables to automate the visual quality inspection, speeding up the inspection process and ensuring all products are evaluated under the same criteria. In this research, we compare supervised and unsupervised defect detection techniques and explore data augmentation techniques to mitigate the data imbalance in the context of automated visual inspection. Furthermore, we use Generative Adversarial Networks for data augmentation to enhance the classifiers' discriminative performance. Our results show that state-of-the-art unsupervised defect detection does not match the performance of supervised models but can be used to reduce the labeling workload by more than 50%. Furthermore, the best classification performance was achieved considering GAN-based data generation with AUC ROC scores equal to or higher than 0,9898, even when increasing the dataset imbalance by leaving only 25\% of the images denoting defective products. We performed the research with real-world data provided by Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV.
abstract_zh: 质量控制是制造公司为确保其产品符合要求和规格而进行的一项重要活动。人工智能模型的引入可以实现视觉质量检测的自动化，加快检测过程并确保所有产品都按照相同的标准进行评估。在这项研究中，我们比较了有监督和无监督的缺陷检测技术，并探索了数据增强技术，以减轻自动视觉检查背景下的数据不平衡。此外，我们使用生成对抗网络进行数据增强，以增强分类器的判别性能。我们的结果表明，最先进的无监督缺陷检测无法与监督模型的性能相匹配，但可以将标记工作量减少 50% 以上。此外，考虑到基于 GAN 的数据生成，AUC ROC 分数等于或高于 0.9898，即使仅留下 25% 的图像表示有缺陷的产品来增加数据集不平衡，也能实现最佳分类性能。我们利用 Philips Consumer Lifestyle BV 提供的真实数据进行了研究。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过生成对抗网络（GAN）进行合成数据增强，以提升自动视觉检测中缺陷分类的性能，解决数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 制造业质量控制依赖自动视觉检测，但缺陷数据不平衡和标注成本高限制了模型性能，需通过数据增强技术优化分类效果。
AI.method: 比较监督与非监督缺陷检测方法，采用GAN生成合成缺陷数据增强训练集，测试不同数据比例下的分类性能。
AI.result: 监督模型优于非监督方法但需大量标注；GAN增强后分类准确率显著提升（AUC ROC≥0.9898），即使缺陷数据仅占25%仍保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: GAN数据增强有效缓解工业检测中的数据不平衡问题，结合非监督方法可降低标注成本，为自动化质量控制提供可行方案。

authors_text: Lyuben Lichev
title: Lower bound on the running time of Pop-Stack Sorting on a random permutation
title_zh: 随机排列上 Pop-Stack 排序的运行时间下限
abstract: Pop-Stack Sorting is an algorithm that takes a permutation as an input and sorts its elements. It consists of several steps. At one step, the algorithm reads the permutation it has to process from left to right and reverses each of its maximal decreasing subsequences of consecutive elements. It terminates at the first step that outputs the identity permutation. In this note, we answer a question of Defant on the running time of Pop-Stack Sorting on the uniform random permutation $σ_n$. More precisely, we show that there is a constant $c > 0.5$ such that asymptotically almost surely, the algorithm needs at least $cn$ steps to terminate on $σ_n$.
summary: Pop-Stack Sorting is an algorithm that takes a permutation as an input and sorts its elements. It consists of several steps. At one step, the algorithm reads the permutation it has to process from left to right and reverses each of its maximal decreasing subsequences of consecutive elements. It terminates at the first step that outputs the identity permutation. In this note, we answer a question of Defant on the running time of Pop-Stack Sorting on the uniform random permutation $σ_n$. More precisely, we show that there is a constant $c > 0.5$ such that asymptotically almost surely, the algorithm needs at least $cn$ steps to terminate on $σ_n$.
abstract_zh: 弹出堆栈排序是一种将排列作为输入并对其元素进行排序的算法。它由几个步骤组成。第一步，算法从左到右读取必须处理的排列，并反转连续元素的每个最大递减子序列。它在输出恒等排列的第一步处终止。在这篇笔记中，我们回答了 Defant 关于均匀随机排列 $σ_n$ 上 Pop-Stack Sorting 的运行时间的问题。更准确地说，我们证明存在一个常数 $c > 0.5$，因此几乎可以肯定，算法至少需要 $cn$ 步才能在 $σ_n$ 上终止。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Pop-Stack排序算法在随机排列上的运行时间下界问题。
AI.motivation: 回答Defant提出的关于Pop-Stack排序算法在随机排列上运行时间的开放性问题。
AI.method: 通过概率分析和组合数学方法，证明存在常数c>0.5使得算法需要至少cn步。
AI.result: 证明了对于随机排列σ_n，算法几乎必然需要至少cn步（c>0.5）才能终止。
AI.conclusion: 确定了Pop-Stack排序算法在随机排列上的运行时间下界，为相关理论研究提供基础。

search_text: Lower bound on the running time of Pop-Stack Sorting on a random permutation 随机排列上 Pop-Stack 排序的运行时间下限 Pop-Stack Sorting is an algorithm that takes a permutation as an input and sorts its elements. It consists of several steps. At one step, the algorithm reads the permutation it has to process from left to right and reverses each of its maximal decreasing subsequences of consecutive elements. It terminates at the first step that outputs the identity permutation. In this note, we answer a question of Defant on the running time of Pop-Stack Sorting on the uniform random permutation $σ_n$. More precisely, we show that there is a constant $c > 0.5$ such that asymptotically almost surely, the algorithm needs at least $cn$ steps to terminate on $σ_n$. 弹出堆栈排序是一种将排列作为输入并对其元素进行排序的算法。它由几个步骤组成。第一步，算法从左到右读取必须处理的排列，并反转连续元素的每个最大递减子序列。它在输出恒等排列的第一步处终止。在这篇笔记中，我们回答了 Defant 关于均匀随机排列 $σ_n$ 上 Pop-Stack Sorting 的运行时间的问题。更准确地说，我们证明存在一个常数 $c > 0.5$，因此几乎可以肯定，算法至少需要 $cn$ 步才能在 $σ_n$ 上终止。 本文研究了Pop-Stack排序算法在随机排列上的运行时间下界问题。 Lyuben Lichev math.PR,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Ramy A. Zeineldin,Mohamed E. Karar,Oliver Burgert,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich
title: Multimodal CNN Networks for Brain Tumor Segmentation in MRI: A BraTS 2022 Challenge Solution
title_zh: 用于 MRI 脑肿瘤分割的多模态 CNN 网络：BraTS 2022 挑战解决方案
comment: Accepted in BraTS 2022 (as part of the BrainLes workshop proceedings distributed by Springer LNCS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.06554
comments: Accepted in BraTS 2022 (as part of the BrainLes workshop proceedings distributed by Springer LNCS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.06554
abstract: Automatic segmentation is essential for the brain tumor diagnosis, disease prognosis, and follow-up therapy of patients with gliomas. Still, accurate detection of gliomas and their sub-regions in multimodal MRI is very challenging due to the variety of scanners and imaging protocols. Over the last years, the BraTS Challenge has provided a large number of multi-institutional MRI scans as a benchmark for glioma segmentation algorithms. This paper describes our contribution to the BraTS 2022 Continuous Evaluation challenge. We propose a new ensemble of multiple deep learning frameworks namely, DeepSeg, nnU-Net, and DeepSCAN for automatic glioma boundaries detection in pre-operative MRI. It is worth noting that our ensemble models took first place in the final evaluation on the BraTS testing dataset with Dice scores of 0.9294, 0.8788, and 0.8803, and Hausdorf distance of 5.23, 13.54, and 12.05, for the whole tumor, tumor core, and enhancing tumor, respectively. Furthermore, the proposed ensemble method ranked first in the final ranking on another unseen test dataset, namely Sub-Saharan Africa dataset, achieving mean Dice scores of 0.9737, 0.9593, and 0.9022, and HD95 of 2.66, 1.72, 3.32 for the whole tumor, tumor core, and enhancing tumor, respectively. The docker image for the winning submission is publicly available at (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/camed22).

Furthermore, the proposed ensemble method ranked first in the final ranking on another unseen test dataset, namely Sub-Saharan Africa dataset, achieving mean Dice scores of 0.9737, 0.9593, and 0.9022, and HD95 of 2.66, 1.72, 3.32 for the whole tumor, tumor core, and enhancing tumor, respectively. The docker image for the winning submission is publicly available at (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/camed22).
abstract_zh: 自动分割对于脑肿瘤的诊断、疾病预后和胶质瘤患者的后续治疗至关重要。尽管如此，由于扫描仪和成像方案多种多样，在多模态 MRI 中准确检测神经胶质瘤及其子区域仍然非常具有挑战性。在过去的几年里，BraTS 挑战赛提供了大量的多机构 MRI 扫描作为神经胶质瘤分割算法的基准。本文介绍了我们对 BraTS 2022 持续评估挑战的贡献。我们提出了一个由多个深度学习框架组成的新集合，即 DeepSeg、nnU-Net 和 DeepSCAN，用于术前 MRI 中的自动神经胶质瘤边界检测。值得注意的是，我们的集成模型在 BraTS 测试数据集的最终评估中获得第一名，整个肿瘤、肿瘤核心和增强肿瘤的 Dice 分数分别为 0.9294、0.8788 和 0.8803，Hausdorf 距离分别为 5.23、13.54 和 12.05。此外，所提出的集成方法在另一个未见过的测试数据集（即撒哈拉以南非洲数据集）的最终排名中排名第一，整个肿瘤、肿瘤核心和增强肿瘤的平均 Dice 得分分别为 0.9737、0.9593 和 0.9022，HD95 分别为 2.66、1.72、3.32。获奖作品的 docker 镜像可在 (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/camed22) 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态CNN网络集成方法，用于MRI中的脑肿瘤分割，并在BraTS 2022挑战赛中取得最佳成绩。
AI.motivation: 胶质瘤的自动分割对临床诊断和治疗至关重要，但因扫描设备和成像协议差异导致分割难度大，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 集成DeepSeg、nnU-Net和DeepSCAN三种深度学习框架，结合多模态MRI数据进行脑肿瘤边界检测。
AI.result: 在BraTS测试集上以Dice分数0.9294/0.8788/0.8803和HD5.23/13.54/12.05获第一；在Sub-Saharan Africa数据集上Dice分数达0.9737/0.9593/0.9022，HD95为2.66/1.72/3.32。
AI.conclusion: 集成方法在多数据集上表现优异，公开的Docker镜像验证了其可复现性，为脑肿瘤分割提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Lorin Sweeney,Graham Healy,Alan F. Smeaton
title: Diffusing Surrogate Dreams of Video Scenes to Predict Video Memorability
title_zh: 扩散视频场景的替代梦来预测视频的记忆力
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, MediaEval-22: Multimedia Evaluation Workshop, 13-15 January 2023, Bergen, Norway and Online
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table, MediaEval-22: Multimedia Evaluation Workshop, 13-15 January 2023, Bergen, Norway and Online
abstract: As part of the MediaEval 2022 Predicting Video Memorability task we explore the relationship between visual memorability, the visual representation that characterises it, and the underlying concept portrayed by that visual representation. We achieve state-of-the-art memorability prediction performance with a model trained and tested exclusively on surrogate dream images, elevating concepts to the status of a cornerstone memorability feature, and finding strong evidence to suggest that the intrinsic memorability of visual content can be distilled to its underlying concept or meaning irrespective of its specific visual representational.
summary: As part of the MediaEval 2022 Predicting Video Memorability task we explore the relationship between visual memorability, the visual representation that characterises it, and the underlying concept portrayed by that visual representation. We achieve state-of-the-art memorability prediction performance with a model trained and tested exclusively on surrogate dream images, elevating concepts to the status of a cornerstone memorability feature, and finding strong evidence to suggest that the intrinsic memorability of visual content can be distilled to its underlying concept or meaning irrespective of its specific visual representational.
abstract_zh: 作为 MediaEval 2022 预测视频记忆性任务的一部分，我们探索了视觉记忆性、表征其特征的视觉表示以及该视觉表示所描绘的基本概念之间的关系。我们通过专门针对替代梦境图像进行训练和测试的模型实现了最先进的记忆性预测性能，将概念提升到基石记忆性特征的地位，并找到强有力的证据表明视觉内容的内在记忆性可以提炼为其潜在的概念或含义，而不管其具体的视觉表征如何。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析视频场景的代理梦境图像，探索视觉记忆性与其底层概念的关系，并实现视频记忆性预测。
AI.motivation: 传统视频记忆性预测依赖具体视觉特征，但作者认为记忆性可能源于内容的底层概念，需验证该假设并寻找更有效的预测方法。
AI.method: 使用代理梦境图像（通过扩散模型生成）训练模型，仅基于图像的底层概念预测视频记忆性，排除具体视觉表征的干扰。
AI.result: 模型在MediaEval 2022任务中达到最先进水平，证实视觉记忆性可被其底层概念独立表征，与具体视觉形式无关。
AI.conclusion: 概念层面的语义特征是视频记忆性的核心驱动因素，未来研究应更关注内容语义而非表观特征。

authors_text: Hao Jia,Feng Duan,Yu Zhang,Zhe Sun,Jordi Sole-Casals
title: Enabling Temporal-Spectral Decoding in Pre-movement Detection
title_zh: 在运动前检测中启用时谱解码
abstract: Non-invasive brain-computer interfaces help the subjects to control external devices by brain intentions. The multi-class classification of upper limb movements can provide external devices with more control commands. The onsets of the upper limb movements are located by the external limb trajectory to eliminate the delay and bias among the trials. However, the trajectories are not recorded due to the limitation of experiments. The delay cannot be avoided in the analysis of signals. The delay negatively influences the classification performance, which limits the further application of upper limb movements in the brain-computer interface. This work focuses on multi-channel brain signals analysis in the temporal-frequency approach. It proposes the two-stage-training temporal-spectral neural network (TTSNet) to decode patterns from brain signals. The TTSNet first divides the signals into various filter banks. In each filter bank, task-related component analysis is used to reduce the dimension and reject the noise of the brain. A convolutional neural network (CNN) is then used to optimize the temporal characteristic of signals and extract class-related features. Finally, these class-related features from all filter banks are fused by concatenation and classified by the fully connected layer of the CNN. The proposed method is evaluated in two public datasets. The results show that TTSNet has an improved accuracy of 0.7456$\pm$0.1205 compared to the EEGNet of 0.6506$\pm$0.1275 ($p<0.05$) and FBTRCA of 0.6787$\pm$0.1260 ($p<0.1$) in the movement detection task, which classifies the movement state and the resting state. The proposed method is expected to help detect limb movements and assist in the rehabilitation of stroke patients.
summary: Non-invasive brain-computer interfaces help the subjects to control external devices by brain intentions. The multi-class classification of upper limb movements can provide external devices with more control commands. The onsets of the upper limb movements are located by the external limb trajectory to eliminate the delay and bias among the trials. However, the trajectories are not recorded due to the limitation of experiments. The delay cannot be avoided in the analysis of signals. The delay negatively influences the classification performance, which limits the further application of upper limb movements in the brain-computer interface. This work focuses on multi-channel brain signals analysis in the temporal-frequency approach. It proposes the two-stage-training temporal-spectral neural network (TTSNet) to decode patterns from brain signals. The TTSNet first divides the signals into various filter banks. In each filter bank, task-related component analysis is used to reduce the dimension and reject the noise of the brain. A convolutional neural network (CNN) is then used to optimize the temporal characteristic of signals and extract class-related features. Finally, these class-related features from all filter banks are fused by concatenation and classified by the fully connected layer of the CNN. The proposed method is evaluated in two public datasets. The results show that TTSNet has an improved accuracy of 0.7456$\pm$0.1205 compared to the EEGNet of 0.6506$\pm$0.1275 ($p<0.05$) and FBTRCA of 0.6787$\pm$0.1260 ($p<0.1$) in the movement detection task, which classifies the movement state and the resting state. The proposed method is expected to help detect limb movements and assist in the rehabilitation of stroke patients.
abstract_zh: 无创脑机接口帮助受试者通过大脑意图控制外部设备。上肢动作的多级分类可以为外部设备提供更多的控制命令。上肢运动的起始点由外肢轨迹定位，以消除试验之间的延迟和偏差。然而，由于实验的限制，没有记录轨迹。在信号分析中延迟是不可避免的。这种延迟会对分类性能产生负面影响，从而限制了上肢运动在脑机接口中的进一步应用。这项工作的重点是时频方法中的多通道脑信号分析。它提出了两阶段训练时谱神经网络（TTSNet）来解码大脑信号中的模式。 TTSNet 首先将信号划分到不同的滤波器组中。在每个滤波器组中，使用与任务相关的成分分析来降低维度并拒绝大脑的噪声。然后使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来优化信号的时间特性并提取与类别相关的特征。最后，来自所有滤波器组的这些与类别相关的特征通过串联进行融合，并由 CNN 的全连接层进行分类。所提出的方法在两个公共数据集中进行评估。结果表明，在对运动状态和静止状态进行分类的运动检测任务中，与 EEGNet 的 0.6506$\pm$0.1275 ($p<0.05$) 和 FBTRCA 的 0.6787$\pm$0.1260 ($p<0.1$) 相比，TTSNet 的准确率提高了 0.7456$\pm$0.1205。所提出的方法有望帮助检测肢体运动并协助中风患者的康复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时频分析的双阶段训练神经网络（TTSNet），用于提高脑机接口中上肢运动预检测的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有脑机接口因信号延迟和轨迹数据缺失导致运动分类性能受限，需改进方法以提升检测精度和实用性。
AI.method: TTSNet通过分频段滤波、任务相关成分分析降噪、卷积神经网络提取时序特征，并融合多频段特征进行分类。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，TTSNet的运动状态分类准确率为0.7456±0.1205，显著优于EEGNet（0.6506±0.1275）和FBTRCA（0.6787±0.1260）（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: TTSNet有效缓解了信号延迟问题，可为脑卒中患者的康复训练提供更精准的肢体运动检测支持。

search_text: Enabling Temporal-Spectral Decoding in Pre-movement Detection 在运动前检测中启用时谱解码 Non-invasive brain-computer interfaces help the subjects to control external devices by brain intentions. The multi-class classification of upper limb movements can provide external devices with more control commands. The onsets of the upper limb movements are located by the external limb trajectory to eliminate the delay and bias among the trials. However, the trajectories are not recorded due to the limitation of experiments. The delay cannot be avoided in the analysis of signals. The delay negatively influences the classification performance, which limits the further application of upper limb movements in the brain-computer interface. This work focuses on multi-channel brain signals analysis in the temporal-frequency approach. It proposes the two-stage-training temporal-spectral neural network (TTSNet) to decode patterns from brain signals. The TTSNet first divides the signals into various filter banks. In each filter bank, task-related component analysis is used to reduce the dimension and reject the noise of the brain. A convolutional neural network (CNN) is then used to optimize the temporal characteristic of signals and extract class-related features. Finally, these class-related features from all filter banks are fused by concatenation and classified by the fully connected layer of the CNN. The proposed method is evaluated in two public datasets. The results show that TTSNet has an improved accuracy of 0.7456$\pm$0.1205 compared to the EEGNet of 0.6506$\pm$0.1275 ($p<0.05$) and FBTRCA of 0.6787$\pm$0.1260 ($p<0.1$) in the movement detection task, which classifies the movement state and the resting state. The proposed method is expected to help detect limb movements and assist in the rehabilitation of stroke patients. 无创脑机接口帮助受试者通过大脑意图控制外部设备。上肢动作的多级分类可以为外部设备提供更多的控制命令。上肢运动的起始点由外肢轨迹定位，以消除试验之间的延迟和偏差。然而，由于实验的限制，没有记录轨迹。在信号分析中延迟是不可避免的。这种延迟会对分类性能产生负面影响，从而限制了上肢运动在脑机接口中的进一步应用。这项工作的重点是时频方法中的多通道脑信号分析。它提出了两阶段训练时谱神经网络（TTSNet）来解码大脑信号中的模式。 TTSNet 首先将信号划分到不同的滤波器组中。在每个滤波器组中，使用与任务相关的成分分析来降低维度并拒绝大脑的噪声。然后使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来优化信号的时间特性并提取与类别相关的特征。最后，来自所有滤波器组的这些与类别相关的特征通过串联进行融合，并由 CNN 的全连接层进行分类。所提出的方法在两个公共数据集中进行评估。结果表明，在对运动状态和静止状态进行分类的运动检测任务中，与 EEGNet 的 0.6506$\pm$0.1275 ($p<0.05$) 和 FBTRCA 的 0.6787$\pm$0.1260 ($p<0.1$) 相比，TTSNet 的准确率提高了 0.7456$\pm$0.1205。所提出的方法有望帮助检测肢体运动并协助中风患者的康复。 本文提出了一种基于时频分析的双阶段训练神经网络（TTSNet），用于提高脑机接口中上肢运动预检测的分类准确性。 Hao Jia,Feng Duan,Yu Zhang,Zhe Sun,Jordi Sole-Casals cs.HC

authors_text: Zekun Qian,Ruize Han,Wei Feng,Feifan Wang,Song Wang
title: From a Bird's Eye View to See: Joint Camera and Subject Registration without the Camera Calibration
title_zh: 从鸟瞰图来看：无需相机校准即可联合相机和拍摄对象配准
abstract: We tackle a new problem of multi-view camera and subject registration in the bird's eye view (BEV) without pre-given camera calibration. This is a very challenging problem since its only input is several RGB images from different first-person views (FPVs) for a multi-person scene, without the BEV image and the calibration of the FPVs, while the output is a unified plane with the localization and orientation of both the subjects and cameras in a BEV. We propose an end-to-end framework solving this problem, whose main idea can be divided into following parts: i) creating a view-transform subject detection module to transform the FPV to a virtual BEV including localization and orientation of each pedestrian, ii) deriving a geometric transformation based method to estimate camera localization and view direction, i.e., the camera registration in a unified BEV, iii) making use of spatial and appearance information to aggregate the subjects into the unified BEV. We collect a new large-scale synthetic dataset with rich annotations for evaluation. The experimental results show the remarkable effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: We tackle a new problem of multi-view camera and subject registration in the bird's eye view (BEV) without pre-given camera calibration. This is a very challenging problem since its only input is several RGB images from different first-person views (FPVs) for a multi-person scene, without the BEV image and the calibration of the FPVs, while the output is a unified plane with the localization and orientation of both the subjects and cameras in a BEV. We propose an end-to-end framework solving this problem, whose main idea can be divided into following parts: i) creating a view-transform subject detection module to transform the FPV to a virtual BEV including localization and orientation of each pedestrian, ii) deriving a geometric transformation based method to estimate camera localization and view direction, i.e., the camera registration in a unified BEV, iii) making use of spatial and appearance information to aggregate the subjects into the unified BEV. We collect a new large-scale synthetic dataset with rich annotations for evaluation. The experimental results show the remarkable effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了多视图相机和鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中的主体注册的新问题，无需预先给定相机校准。这是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，因为它的唯一输入是来自多人场景的不同第一人称视图 (FPV) 的多个 RGB 图像，没有 BEV 图像和 FPV 校准，而输出是一个统一的平面，其中包含 BEV 中主体和摄像机的定位和方向。我们提出了一个解决这个问题的端到端框架，其主要思想可以分为以下部分：i）创建一个视图变换主体检测模块，将 FPV 转换为虚拟 BEV，包括每个行人的定位和方向，ii）导出基于几何变换的方法来估计相机定位和视图方向，即统一 BEV 中的相机注册，iii）利用空间和外观信息将主体聚合到统一 BEV 中。我们收集了一个新的大规模合成数据集，具有丰富的注释用于评估。实验结果表明我们提出的方法具有显着的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预先相机标定的多视角相机与主体联合注册方法，通过第一视角图像生成统一的鸟瞰图（BEV）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖相机标定信息，但在实际场景中标定数据往往难以获取，尤其在多人多视角场景下存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架：1) 构建视角转换主体检测模块，将第一视角图像转换为包含行人定位信息的虚拟BEV；2) 基于几何变换估计相机位置与视角方向；3) 利用空间与外观信息将主体聚合到统一BEV中。
AI.result: 在自建的大规模合成数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验结果表明该方法在无标定情况下实现了准确的相机与主体联合注册。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法突破了传统标定依赖，为无需标定的多视角场景理解提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Junyang Lin,Xuancheng Ren,Yichang Zhang,Gao Liu,Peng Wang,An Yang,Chang Zhou
title: Transferring General Multimodal Pretrained Models to Text Recognition
title_zh: 将通用多模态预训练模型转移到文本识别
abstract: This paper proposes a new method, OFA-OCR, to transfer multimodal pretrained models to text recognition. Specifically, we recast text recognition as image captioning and directly transfer a unified vision-language pretrained model to the end task. Without pretraining on large-scale annotated or synthetic text recognition data, OFA-OCR outperforms the baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance in the Chinese text recognition benchmark. Additionally, we construct an OCR pipeline with OFA-OCR, and we demonstrate that it can achieve competitive performance with the product-level API. The code (https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA) and demo (https://modelscope.cn/studios/damo/ofa_ocr_pipeline/summary) are publicly available.
summary: This paper proposes a new method, OFA-OCR, to transfer multimodal pretrained models to text recognition. Specifically, we recast text recognition as image captioning and directly transfer a unified vision-language pretrained model to the end task. Without pretraining on large-scale annotated or synthetic text recognition data, OFA-OCR outperforms the baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance in the Chinese text recognition benchmark. Additionally, we construct an OCR pipeline with OFA-OCR, and we demonstrate that it can achieve competitive performance with the product-level API. The code (https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA) and demo (https://modelscope.cn/studios/damo/ofa_ocr_pipeline/summary) are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法 OFA-OCR，将多模态预训练模型转移到文本识别。具体来说，我们将文本识别重新定义为图像字幕，并将统一的视觉语言预训练模型直接传输到最终任务。无需对大规模注释或合成文本识别数据进行预训练，OFA-OCR 的性能就优于基线，并在中文文本识别基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们使用 OFA-OCR 构建了 OCR 管道，并证明它可以通过产品级 API 实现具有竞争力的性能。代码（https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA）和演示（https://modelscope.cn/studios/damo/ofa_ocr_pipeline/summary）是公开的。

AI.tldr: 提出OFA-OCR方法，将多模态预训练模型迁移至文本识别任务，无需大量标注数据
AI.motivation: 传统文本识别依赖大量标注数据，而多模态预训练模型可无需额外数据直接迁移，提升效率
AI.method: 将文本识别任务重构为图像描述生成，直接迁移统一的视觉-语言预训练模型，无需特定数据预训练
AI.result: 在中文文本识别基准上达到最先进水平，OCR流水线性能接近产品级API
AI.conclusion: 证明了多模态预训练模型在文本识别任务中的有效迁移，为少样本场景提供新思路

search_text: Transferring General Multimodal Pretrained Models to Text Recognition 将通用多模态预训练模型转移到文本识别 This paper proposes a new method, OFA-OCR, to transfer multimodal pretrained models to text recognition. Specifically, we recast text recognition as image captioning and directly transfer a unified vision-language pretrained model to the end task. Without pretraining on large-scale annotated or synthetic text recognition data, OFA-OCR outperforms the baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance in the Chinese text recognition benchmark. Additionally, we construct an OCR pipeline with OFA-OCR, and we demonstrate that it can achieve competitive performance with the product-level API. The code (https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA) and demo (https://modelscope.cn/studios/damo/ofa_ocr_pipeline/summary) are publicly available. 本文提出了一种新方法 OFA-OCR，将多模态预训练模型转移到文本识别。具体来说，我们将文本识别重新定义为图像字幕，并将统一的视觉语言预训练模型直接传输到最终任务。无需对大规模注释或合成文本识别数据进行预训练，OFA-OCR 的性能就优于基线，并在中文文本识别基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们使用 OFA-OCR 构建了 OCR 管道，并证明它可以通过产品级 API 实现具有竞争力的性能。代码（https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA）和演示（https://modelscope.cn/studios/damo/ofa_ocr_pipeline/summary）是公开的。 提出OFA-OCR方法，将多模态预训练模型迁移至文本识别任务，无需大量标注数据 Junyang Lin,Xuancheng Ren,Yichang Zhang,Gao Liu,Peng Wang,An Yang,Chang Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Terence Jie Chua,Wenhan Yu,Jun Zhao
title: Unified, User and Task (UUT) Centered Artificial Intelligence for Metaverse Edge Computing
title_zh: 用于元界边缘计算的统一、以用户和任务 (UUT) 为中心的人工智能
abstract: The Metaverse can be considered the extension of the present-day web, which integrates the physical and virtual worlds, delivering hyper-realistic user experiences. The inception of the Metaverse brings forth many ecosystem services such as content creation, social entertainment, in-world value transfer, intelligent traffic, healthcare. These services are compute-intensive and require computation offloading onto a Metaverse edge computing server (MECS). Existing Metaverse edge computing approaches do not efficiently and effectively handle resource allocation to ensure a fluid, seamless and hyper-realistic Metaverse experience required for Metaverse ecosystem services. Therefore, we introduce a new Metaverse-compatible, Unified, User and Task (UUT) centered artificial intelligence (AI)- based mobile edge computing (MEC) paradigm, which serves as a concept upon which future AI control algorithms could be built to develop a more user and task-focused MEC.
summary: The Metaverse can be considered the extension of the present-day web, which integrates the physical and virtual worlds, delivering hyper-realistic user experiences. The inception of the Metaverse brings forth many ecosystem services such as content creation, social entertainment, in-world value transfer, intelligent traffic, healthcare. These services are compute-intensive and require computation offloading onto a Metaverse edge computing server (MECS). Existing Metaverse edge computing approaches do not efficiently and effectively handle resource allocation to ensure a fluid, seamless and hyper-realistic Metaverse experience required for Metaverse ecosystem services. Therefore, we introduce a new Metaverse-compatible, Unified, User and Task (UUT) centered artificial intelligence (AI)- based mobile edge computing (MEC) paradigm, which serves as a concept upon which future AI control algorithms could be built to develop a more user and task-focused MEC.
abstract_zh: 元宇宙可以被认为是当今网络的延伸，它整合了物理世界和虚拟世界，提供超现实的用户体验。元宇宙的诞生带来了内容创作、社交娱乐、世界价值转移、智能交通、医疗保健等众多生态服务。这些服务是计算密集型的，需要将计算卸载到 Metaverse 边缘计算服务器 (MECS) 上。现有的元界边缘计算方法无法高效、有效地处理资源分配，以确保元界生态系统服务所需的流畅、无缝和超现实的元界体验。因此，我们引入了一种新的兼容 Metaverse、统一的、以用户和任务 (UUT) 为中心的基于人工智能 (AI) 的移动边缘计算 (MEC) 范式，该范式可以作为未来人工智能控制算法构建的概念，以开发更加以用户和任务为中心的 MEC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以用户和任务为中心的AI驱动的元宇宙边缘计算范式，旨在优化资源分配以提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有元宇宙边缘计算方法无法高效处理资源分配，导致用户体验不流畅，需更智能化的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入统一的UUT（用户和任务）中心人工智能框架，构建未来AI控制算法的基础，实现更精准的资源分配。
AI.result: 提出了一种新的元宇宙边缘计算范式，为后续算法开发提供理论支持，但尚未展示具体实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 该范式为构建用户和任务导向的边缘计算系统提供了方向，有助于推动元宇宙生态的高效发展。
